#### make me a next.js project from scratch  

To create a Next.js project from scratch, I'll guide you through the initial setup. Below are the key files and their contents for a basic Next.js application.

### 1. **Initialize the Project**
First, run the following commands in your terminal to set up a new Next.js project:

```bash
npx create-next-app@latest my-next-app
cd my-next-app
```

### 2. **Project Structure**
Here’s the basic structure of a Next.js project:

```
my-next-app/
├── pages/
│   ├── index.js       # Homepage
│   └── _app.js        # Custom App component
├── styles/
│   └── globals.css    # Global styles
├── package.json       # Project dependencies
└── next.config.js     # Next.js configuration
```

---

### 3. **Key Files**

#### `pages/index.js`
This is the homepage of your Next.js app.

```javascript
export default function Home() {
  return (
    <div>
      <h1>Welcome to My Next.js App!</h1>
      <p>This is a casual greeting.</p>
    </div>
  );
}
```

#### `pages/_app.js`
This file is used to customize the App component (e.g., for global styles or layout).

```javascript
import '../styles/globals.css';

function MyApp({ Component, pageProps }) {
  return <Component {...pageProps} />;
}

export default MyApp;
```

#### `styles/globals.css`
Global CSS styles for the app.

```css
body {
  font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
  background-color: #f5f5f5;
}

h1 {
  color: #333;
}
```

#### `package.json`
Dependencies and scripts for the project.

```json
{
  "name": "my-next-app",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "start": "next start"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "next": "latest",
    "react": "^18.2.0",
    "react-dom": "^18.2.0"
  }
}
```

#### `next.config.js`
Next.js configuration (optional, can be empty for basic setups).

```javascript
module.exports = {
  reactStrictMode: true,
};
```

---

### 4. **Run the Project**
Start the development server:

```bash
npm run dev
```

Open your browser to `http://localhost:3000` to see the app running.

---

### Summary of Changes:
- Created a basic Next.js project structure.
- Added a casual greeting on the homepage (`pages/index.js`).
- Included global styles (`styles/globals.css`).
- Configured `package.json` with essential scripts and dependencies.

1. **pages/index.js** (Homepage with game categories and grid)
2. **pages/auth/login.js** (Login page)

### Updated `pages/index.js` (Casino Homepage)
```jsx
import Head from 'next/head';
import Link from 'next/link';
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import GameCard from '../components/GameCard';

export default function Home() {
  const [user, setUser] = useState(null);
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(0);

  // Mock data for featured games and categories
  const featuredGames = [
    { id: 1, name: 'Crash', category: 'Originals', thumbnail: '/images/crash.png' },
    { id: 2, name: 'Dice', category: 'Originals', thumbnail: '/images/dice.png' },
  ];

  const categories = [
    { name: 'Slots', games: [
      { id: 3, name: 'Lucky Slots', thumbnail: '/images/slots1.png' },
      { id: 4, name: 'Mega Win', thumbnail: '/images/slots2.png' },
    ]},
    { name: 'Originals', games: [
      { id: 1, name: 'Crash', thumbnail: '/images/crash.png' },
      { id: 2, name: 'Dice', thumbnail: '/images/dice.png' },
    ]},
    { name: 'Live', games: [
      { id: 5, name: 'Live Roulette', thumbnail: '/images/roulette.png' },
    ]},
    { name: 'New', games: [
      { id: 6, name: 'Space Adventure', thumbnail: '/images/new1.png' },
    ]},
  ];

  // Load user data (mock for now)
  useEffect(() => {
    const mockUser = { name: 'Player1', balance: 1000 };
    setUser(mockUser);
    setBalance(mockUser.balance);
  }, []);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-900 to-black text-white">
      <Head>
        <title>Neon Casino | Play with Virtual Coins</title>
      </Head>

      {/* Header */}
      <header className="bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-50 border-b border-white/10">
        <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-3 flex justify-between items-center">
          <Link href="/" className="text-2xl font-bold text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-400 to-pink-600">
            NEON CASINO
          </Link>
          <div className="flex items-center space-x-4">
            {user ? (
              <>
                <span className="bg-purple-600 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm">
                  Balance: {balance} ✧
                </span>
                <Link href="/leaderboard" className="hover:text-purple-400 transition">
                  Leaderboard
                </Link>
              </>
            ) : (
              <Link href="/auth/login" className="bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition">
                Login
              </Link>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      {/* Hero Banner */}
      <section className="relative h-64 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-900 to-pink-900 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
        <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/20"></div>
        <div className="relative z-10 text-center">
          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-2">Welcome to Neon Casino</h1>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-300">Play with virtual coins and win big!</p>
          {!user && (
            <Link href="/auth/register" className="mt-4 inline-block bg-pink-600 hover:bg-pink-700 px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-semibold transition">
              Sign Up & Get 1000 Free Coins
            </Link>
          )}
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Featured Games */}
      <section className="container mx-auto px-4 py-12">
        <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8 flex items-center">
          <span className="w-1 h-8 bg-purple-500 mr-3"></span>
          Featured Games
        </h2>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
          {featuredGames.map((game) => (
            <GameCard key={game.id} game={game} />
          ))}
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Game Categories */}
      {categories.map((category) => (
        <section key={category.name} className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6 flex items-center">
            <span className="w-1 h-6 bg-pink-500 mr-3"></span>
            {category.name}
          </h2>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-4">
            {category.games.map((game) => (
              <GameCard key={game.id} game={game} small />
            ))}
          </div>
        </section>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
```

### Updated `styles/globals.css` (Dark Casino Theme)
```css
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

/* Custom styles for glassmorphism and neon effects */
.glass {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
}

.neon-text {
  text-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(219, 39, 119, 0.5), 0 0 10px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.3);
}

.btn-neon {
  box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(219, 39, 119, 0.3), 0 0 10px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.2);
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.btn-neon:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(219, 39, 119, 0.5), 0 0 20px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.4);
}

/* Scrollbar styling */
::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 8px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: #1a1a1a;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #a855f7, #db2777);
  border-radius: 4px;
}
```

The issue is that you're missing the `GameCard` component that's being imported in the `pages/index.js` file. Let me create that component for you:

components/GameCard.js
```
import Link from 'next/link';

export default function GameCard({ game, small = false }) {
  return (
    <Link
      href={`/games/${game.name.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-')}`}
      className={`block ${small ? 'transform hover:scale-105' : 'transform hover:scale-105 hover:rotate-1'} transition-all duration-300`}
    >
      <div className={`bg-gray-800/50 rounded-lg overflow-hidden border border-white/10 ${small ? 'h-32' : 'h-48'}`}>
        <div className={`relative h-3/4 bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-900 to-pink-900 p-2`}>
          <img
            src={game.thumbnail}
            alt={game.name}
            className="w-full h-full object-cover rounded"
            onError={(e) => {
              e.target.src = '/images/placeholder.png'; // Fallback image
            }}
          />
        </div>
        <div className={`p-3 ${small ? 'text-xs' : 'text-sm'}`}>
          <h3 className="font-bold truncate">{game.name}</h3>
          {game.category && (
            <p className="text-purple-400 text-xs truncate">{game.category}</p>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </Link>
  );
}
```

To make this work, you'll need to:

1. Replace your current `pages/index.js` with the one I provided
2. Replace your current `styles/globals.css` with the one I provided
3. Create a new file `components/GameCard.js` with the content I provided

After making these changes, the casino theme should appear when you run `npm run dev`. The site will show:
- A dark theme with neon accents
- A header with the casino logo and user balance
- A hero banner
- Featured games section
- Game categories with grids of games

You may also want to add some placeholder images in your `public/images` folder for the game thumbnails.

I understand the issue. The website is stuck on compiling and lacks CSS styling. Let me provide the corrected files to fix these problems.

First, let's update the `pages/_app.js` file to ensure proper CSS loading:

pages/_app.js
```
import '../styles/globals.css'
import { useEffect } from 'react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/router'

function MyApp({ Component, pageProps }) {
  const router = useRouter()

  useEffect(() => {
    // Remove any existing CSS that might be causing conflicts
    const existingStyles = document.querySelectorAll('style[data-next-href]')
    existingStyles.forEach(style => style.remove())
  }, [router.asPath])

  return <Component {...pageProps} />
}

export default MyApp
```

Now let's update the `styles/globals.css` file to ensure proper Tailwind integration:

styles/globals.css
```
@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

@layer base {
  :root {
    --color-primary: #a855f7;
    --color-secondary: #db2777;
    --color-dark: #111827;
    --color-darker: #0f172a;
  }
}

@layer components {
  .btn-primary {
    @apply bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 text-white font-medium py-2 px-4 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200;
  }

  .btn-secondary {
    @apply bg-pink-600 hover:bg-pink-700 text-white font-medium py-2 px-4 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-200;
  }

  .card {
    @apply bg-gray-800/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/10 rounded-lg shadow-lg;
  }
}

.glass-effect {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
}

.neon-text {
  text-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(219, 39, 119, 0.5), 0 0 10px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.3);
}

.btn-neon {
  box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(219, 39, 119, 0.3), 0 0 10px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.2);
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.btn-neon:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(219, 39, 119, 0.5), 0 0 20px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.4);
}

/* Scrollbar styling */
::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 8px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: #1a1a1a;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #a855f7, #db2777);
  border-radius: 4px;
}
```

pages/index.js

import Head from 'next/head'
import Link from 'next/link'
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import GameCard from '../components/GameCard'

export default function Home() {
  const [user, setUser] = useState(null)
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(0)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)

  // Mock data for featured games and categories
  const featuredGames = [
    { id: 1, name: 'Crash', category: 'Originals', thumbnail: '/images/crash.png' },
    { id: 2, name: 'Dice', category: 'Originals', thumbnail: '/images/dice.png' },
  ]

  const categories = [
    { name: 'Slots', games: [
      { id: 3, name: 'Lucky Slots', thumbnail: '/images/slots1.png' },
      { id: 4, name: 'Mega Win', thumbnail: '/images/slots2.png' },
    ]},
    { name: 'Originals', games: [
      { id: 1, name: 'Crash', thumbnail: '/images/crash.png' },
      { id: 2, name: 'Dice', thumbnail: '/images/dice.png' },
    ]},
    { name: 'Live', games: [
      { id: 5, name: 'Live Roulette', thumbnail: '/images/roulette.png' },
    ]},
    { name: 'New', games: [
      { id: 6, name: 'Space Adventure', thumbnail: '/images/new1.png' },
    ]},
  ]

  // Load user data (mock for now)
  useEffect(() => {
    const mockUser = { name: 'Player1', balance: 1000 }
    setUser(mockUser)
    setBalance(mockUser.balance)
    setLoading(false)
  }, [])

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-900 to-black flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-t-2 border-b-2 border-purple-500"></div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-b from-gray-900 to-black text-white">
      <Head>
        <title>Neon Casino | Play with Virtual Coins</title>
        <meta name="description" content="Virtual casino with play money games" />
        <link rel="icon" href="/favicon.ico" />
      </Head>

      {/* Header */}
      <header className="bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-50 border-b border-white/10 glass-effect">
        <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-3 flex justify-between items-center">
          <Link href="/" className="text-2xl font-bold text-transparent bg-clip-text bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-400 to-pink-600 neon-text">
            NEON CASINO
          </Link>
          <div className="flex items-center space-x-4">
            {user ? (
              <>
                <span className="bg-purple-600 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm btn-neon">
                  Balance: {balance} ✧
                </span>
                <Link href="/leaderboard" className="hover:text-purple-400 transition">
                  Leaderboard
                </Link>
              </>
            ) : (
              <Link href="/auth/login" className="btn-secondary">
                Login
              </Link>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>

      {/* Hero Banner */}
      <section className="relative h-64 bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-900 to-pink-900 flex items-center justify-center overflow-hidden">
        <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/20"></div>
        <div className="relative z-10 text-center">
          <h1 className="text-5xl font-bold mb-2 neon-text">Welcome to Neon Casino</h1>
          <p className="text-xl text-gray-300">Play with virtual coins and win big!</p>
          {!user && (
            <Link href="/auth/register" className="mt-4 inline-block btn-secondary">
              Sign Up & Get 1000 Free Coins
            </Link>
          )}
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Featured Games */}
      <section className="container mx-auto px-4 py-12">
        <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8 flex items-center">
          <span className="w-1 h-8 bg-purple-500 mr-3"></span>
          Featured Games
        </h2>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
          {featuredGames.map((game) => (
            <GameCard key={game.id} game={game} />
          ))}
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* Game Categories */}
      {categories.map((category) => (
        <section key={category.name} className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8">
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6 flex items-center">
            <span className="w-1 h-6 bg-pink-500 mr-3"></span>
            {category.name}
          </h2>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-4">
            {category.games.map((game) => (
              <GameCard key={game.id} game={game} small />
            ))}
          </div>
        </section>
      ))}
    </div>
  )
}
```

#### okay, nice start but its still stuck on compiling, should i be worried?  

The output shows that the Next.js development server is running successfully, but there are a few issues to address:

1. **Missing Image Files**: The server is returning 404 errors for image files like `/images/crash.png`, `/images/dice.png`, etc. These files are referenced in your code but don't exist in the `public/images` directory.

2. **Missing Pages**: The server is returning 404 errors for routes like `/games/crash`, `/games/dice`, and `/leaderboard`. These routes are linked in your application but the corresponding page files don't exist.

3. **Compilation Time**: The compilation time is not unusually long (e.g., "compile: 1043ms" for the initial load is normal for a development build).

### Steps to Fix:

#### 1. Add Missing Image Files
Create a `public/images` directory and add the missing image files (`crash.png`, `dice.png`, etc.).

#### 2. Create Missing Pages
Create the missing page files for the routes that are returning 404 errors. For example:

**pages/games/[game].js**
```javascript
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';

export default function GamePage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const { game } = router.query;

  return (
    <div>
      <h1>Game: {game}</h1>
      <p>This is the page for the game {game}.</p>
    </div>
  );
}
```

**pages/leaderboard.js**
```javascript
export default function Leaderboard() {
  return (
    <div>
      <h1>Leaderboard</h1>
      <p>This is the leaderboard page.</p>
    </div>
  );
}
```

#### 3. Verify Image Paths
Ensure that the image paths in your components (e.g., `GameCard.js`) are correct. The images should be placed in the `public/images` directory, and the paths should start with `/images/`.

### Summary:
- The server is running fine; the "compiling" message is normal for Next.js in development mode.
- The 404 errors are due to missing files and pages, not a problem with the server or compilation.
- Add the missing image files and create the missing page files to resolve the 404 errors.

#### okay great lets implement the very first game, crash  

To implement the Crash game, we'll need to create a new page for it. Here's the implementation:

pages/games/crash.js
```
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';

export default function CrashGame() {
  const [multiplier, setMultiplier] = useState(1.00);
  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState('idle'); // 'idle', 'running', 'crashed'
  const [bets, setBets] = useState([]);
  const [autoCashout, setAutoCashout] = useState(null);
  const [lastCrash, setLastCrash] = useState(null);
  const router = useRouter();

  // Generate random crash point between 1.00x and 100.00x
  const generateCrashPoint = () => {
    return Math.max(1.00, Math.random() * 100).toFixed(2);
  };

  const startGame = () => {
    setGameState('running');
    setMultiplier(1.00);
    setLastCrash(null);

    const crashPoint = parseFloat(generateCrashPoint());
    const startTime = Date.now();
    const duration = 10000; // 10 seconds to reach crash point

    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
      const progress = elapsed / duration;
      const currentMultiplier = 1 + (crashPoint - 1) * progress;

      setMultiplier(currentMultiplier.toFixed(2));

      // Check if we should auto cashout
      if (autoCashout && currentMultiplier >= autoCashout) {
        cashout();
      }

      // Check if game should crash
      if (currentMultiplier >= crashPoint) {
        clearInterval(interval);
        setGameState('crashed');
        setLastCrash(crashPoint.toFixed(2));
      }
    }, 50);
  };

  const cashout = () => {
    // In a real implementation, this would process payouts
    console.log(`Cashed out at ${multiplier}x`);
  };

  const placeBet = (amount) => {
    const newBet = {
      id: Date.now(),
      amount,
      cashoutAt: autoCashout || null,
      user: 'Player' + Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000)
    };
    setBets([...bets, newBet]);
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (gameState === 'crashed') {
      const timer = setTimeout(() => {
        setGameState('idle');
      }, 3000);
      return () => clearTimeout(timer);
    }
  }, [gameState]);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 text-white p-4">
      <button
        onClick={() => router.back()}
        className="mb-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"
      >
        ← Back to Games
      </button>

      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-center mb-8 text-yellow-400">CRASH</h1>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-6xl font-bold mb-4" style={{
              color: gameState === 'crashed' ? '#ef4444' :
                     gameState === 'running' ? '#10b981' : '#fbbf24'
            }}>
              {multiplier}x
            </div>

            {gameState === 'idle' && (
              <button
                onClick={startGame}
                className="bg-yellow-500 hover:bg-yellow-600 text-black font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-lg text-lg transition-colors"
              >
                START GAME
              </button>
            )}

            {gameState === 'crashed' && (
              <div className="text-red-500 text-xl font-bold">
                Game crashed at {lastCrash}x
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6">
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-2">Auto Cashout</h3>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <input
                type="number"
                value={autoCashout || ''}
                onChange={(e) => setAutoCashout(parseFloat(e.target.value) || null)}
                placeholder="1.00"
                min="1.00"
                max="100.00"
                step="0.01"
                className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 flex-1"
              />
              <span className="text-gray-400">x</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-2">Quick Bet</h3>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
              {[1, 5, 10, 25, 50, 100].map((amount) => (
                <button
                  key={amount}
                  onClick={() => placeBet(amount)}
                  className="bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white py-2 px-3 rounded text-sm transition-colors"
                >
                  {amount}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-2">Your Bet</h3>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <input
                type="number"
                placeholder="Amount"
                min="1"
                className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 flex-1"
              />
              <button className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded transition-colors">
                Bet
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
          <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Active Bets ({bets.length})</h3>
          {bets.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No active bets</p>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {bets.map((bet) => (
                <div key={bet.id} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-700 rounded p-2">
                  <div>
                    <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">{bet.user}</span>
                    <span className="text-gray-300 ml-2">${bet.amount}</span>
                  </div>
                  {bet.cashoutAt && (
                    <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                      Auto: {bet.cashoutAt}x
                    </span>
                  )}
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

This implementation includes:

1. A Crash game with a multiplier that increases over time
2. Game states: idle, running, and crashed
3. Auto cashout functionality
4. Bet placement system
5. Active bets display
6. Responsive design with Tailwind CSS
7. Navigation back to the games list

The game simulates the Crash mechanics where players bet on a multiplier that increases until it randomly crashes. Players can set an auto cashout value to automatically cash out at their desired multiplier.

1. Create a `pages/games` directory if it doesn't exist
2. Add this file as `pages/games/crash.js`
3. Make sure you have the required images in your `public/images` directory (or update the paths in your GameCard component)

#### make requirements of actual bet amounts and where to stop the crash, and it also didnt draw any money from the balance, so implement that as well  

I'll update the Crash game to include balance management, proper betting requirements, and crash point determination. Here's the updated file:

pages/games/crash.js
```
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';

export default function CrashGame() {
  const [multiplier, setMultiplier] = useState(1.00);
  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState('idle'); // 'idle', 'running', 'crashed'
  const [bets, setBets] = useState([]);
  const [autoCashout, setAutoCashout] = useState(null);
  const [lastCrash, setLastCrash] = useState(null);
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(1000); // Starting balance
  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState('');
  const [crashPoint, setCrashPoint] = useState(null);
  const [gameHistory, setGameHistory] = useState([]);
  const router = useRouter();

  // Generate random crash point between 1.00x and 100.00x
  const generateCrashPoint = () => {
    // Using a more realistic distribution for crash points
    const randomValue = Math.random();
    // Higher probability for lower multipliers (more common in real crash games)
    return Math.max(1.00, Math.pow(100, randomValue)).toFixed(2);
  };

  const startGame = () => {
    if (gameState !== 'idle') return;

    const newCrashPoint = parseFloat(generateCrashPoint());
    setCrashPoint(newCrashPoint);
    setGameState('running');
    setMultiplier(1.00);
    setLastCrash(null);

    const startTime = Date.now();
    const duration = 10000; // 10 seconds to reach crash point

    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
      const progress = elapsed / duration;
      const currentMultiplier = 1 + (newCrashPoint - 1) * progress;

      setMultiplier(currentMultiplier.toFixed(2));

      // Check if any bets should auto cashout
      bets.forEach(bet => {
        if (!bet.cashedOut && bet.cashoutAt && currentMultiplier >= bet.cashoutAt) {
          cashout(bet.id, currentMultiplier);
        }
      });

      // Check if game should crash
      if (currentMultiplier >= newCrashPoint) {
        clearInterval(interval);
        setGameState('crashed');
        setLastCrash(newCrashPoint.toFixed(2));

        // Add to game history
        setGameHistory(prev => [
          { crashPoint: newCrashPoint.toFixed(2), timestamp: new Date() },
          ...prev.slice(0, 9) // Keep only last 10 games
        ]);
      }
    }, 50);
  };

  const placeBet = () => {
    if (gameState !== 'idle') {
      alert('Please wait until the current game finishes');
      return;
    }

    const amount = parseFloat(betAmount);
    if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) {
      alert('Please enter a valid bet amount');
      return;
    }

    if (amount > balance) {
      alert('Insufficient balance');
      return;
    }

    const newBet = {
      id: Date.now(),
      amount,
      cashoutAt: autoCashout || null,
      user: 'You',
      cashedOut: false,
      cashoutMultiplier: null
    };

    setBets([...bets, newBet]);
    setBalance(balance - amount);
    setBetAmount('');
  };

  const cashout = (betId, currentMultiplier) => {
    setBets(prevBets =>
      prevBets.map(bet => {
        if (bet.id === betId && !bet.cashedOut) {
          const winnings = bet.amount * currentMultiplier;
          setBalance(prevBalance => prevBalance + winnings);
          return {
            ...bet,
            cashedOut: true,
            cashoutMultiplier: currentMultiplier
          };
        }
        return bet;
      })
    );
  };

  const cashoutAll = () => {
    if (gameState !== 'running') return;

    bets.forEach(bet => {
      if (!bet.cashedOut) {
        cashout(bet.id, multiplier);
      }
    });
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (gameState === 'crashed') {
      const timer = setTimeout(() => {
        setGameState('idle');
        // Clear bets that didn't cash out
        setBets(prevBets =>
          prevBets.filter(bet => bet.cashedOut)
        );
      }, 3000);
      return () => clearTimeout(timer);
    }
  }, [gameState]);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 text-white p-4">
      <button
        onClick={() => router.back()}
        className="mb-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"
      >
        ← Back to Games
      </button>

      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-yellow-400">CRASH</h1>
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2">
            <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">Balance:</span>
            <span className="text-white font-bold ml-2">${balance.toFixed(2)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-6xl font-bold mb-4" style={{
              color: gameState === 'crashed' ? '#ef4444' :
                     gameState === 'running' ? '#10b981' : '#fbbf24'
            }}>
              {multiplier}x
            </div>

            {gameState === 'idle' && (
              <button
                onClick={startGame}
                className="bg-yellow-500 hover:bg-yellow-600 text-black font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-lg text-lg transition-colors"
              >
                START GAME
              </button>
            )}

            {gameState === 'running' && (
              <div className="space-y-4">
                <button
                  onClick={cashoutAll}
                  className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-lg text-lg transition-colors"
                >
                  CASH OUT ALL
                </button>
                {crashPoint && (
                  <div className="text-gray-400 text-sm">
                    Next crash: ~{crashPoint.toFixed(2)}x
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}

            {gameState === 'crashed' && (
              <div className="text-red-500 text-xl font-bold">
                Game crashed at {lastCrash}x
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6">
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-2">Auto Cashout</h3>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <input
                type="number"
                value={autoCashout || ''}
                onChange={(e) => setAutoCashout(parseFloat(e.target.value) || null)}
                placeholder="1.00"
                min="1.00"
                max="100.00"
                step="0.01"
                className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 flex-1"
                disabled={gameState !== 'idle'}
              />
              <span className="text-gray-400">x</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-2">Quick Bet</h3>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
              {[1, 5, 10, 25, 50, 100].map((amount) => (
                <button
                  key={amount}
                  onClick={() => {
                    setBetAmount(amount);
                    placeBet();
                  }}
                  className="bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white py-2 px-3 rounded text-sm transition-colors"
                  disabled={gameState !== 'idle' || amount > balance}
                >
                  {amount}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-2">Your Bet</h3>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <input
                type="number"
                value={betAmount}
                onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Amount"
                min="1"
                max={balance}
                className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 flex-1"
                disabled={gameState !== 'idle'}
              />
              <button
                onClick={placeBet}
                className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded transition-colors"
                disabled={gameState !== 'idle'}
              >
                Bet
              </button>
            </div>
            <div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">
              Max: ${balance.toFixed(2)}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Active Bets ({bets.length})</h3>
            {bets.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No active bets</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {bets.map((bet) => (
                  <div key={bet.id} className={`flex justify-between items-center rounded p-2 ${
                    bet.cashedOut ? 'bg-green-900/50' : 'bg-gray-700'
                  }`}>
                    <div>
                      <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">{bet.user}</span>
                      <span className="text-gray-300 ml-2">${bet.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      {bet.cashedOut ? (
                        <>
                          <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                            Cashed out at {bet.cashoutMultiplier}x
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">
                            +${(bet.amount * bet.cashoutMultiplier).toFixed(2)}
                          </span>
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        <>
                          {bet.cashoutAt && (
                            <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                              Auto: {bet.cashoutAt}x
                            </span>
                          )}
                          {!bet.cashoutAt && gameState === 'running' && (
                            <button
                              onClick={() => cashout(bet.id, multiplier)}
                              className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded transition-colors"
                            >
                              Cash Out
                            </button>
                          )}
                        </>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Game History</h3>
            {gameHistory.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No game history</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {gameHistory.map((game, index) => (
                  <div key={index} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-700 rounded p-2">
                    <span className="text-gray-300">Game #{index + 1}</span>
                    <span className={`font-bold ${
                      parseFloat(game.crashPoint) < 2 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-green-400'
                    }`}>
                      {game.crashPoint}x
                    </span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

Key improvements made:

1. **Balance Management**:
   - Added a balance state that starts at $1000
   - Bets are deducted from balance when placed
   - Winnings are added to balance when cashing out

2. **Proper Betting Requirements**:
   - Added validation for bet amounts (must be positive, not exceed balance)
   - Disabled betting during active games
   - Added maximum bet amount display

3. **Crash Point Determination**:
   - Improved the crash point generation to use a more realistic distribution
   - Higher probability for lower multipliers (more common in real crash games)
   - Shows the next crash point during the game (for testing purposes)

4. **Game History**:
   - Added tracking of previous game results
   - Shows last 10 game outcomes

5. **Enhanced Bet Management**:
   - Individual cashout buttons for each bet
   - Cash out all button
   - Visual indication of cashed out bets
   - Shows winnings for cashed out bets

6. **Improved UI**:
   - Added balance display in the header
   - Better visual feedback for game states
   - Disabled inputs during active games

The game now properly tracks balance, validates bets, and provides a more realistic crash game experience. Players can see their balance change as they place bets and cash out.

#### okay so two things, the crash multiplier goes WAAAAY too fast and also is too "op", i want it realistic-ish, also why does it say when the crash is going to happen? fix that  

I'll fix both issues: slow down the multiplier progression and remove the crash point preview. Here's the updated Crash game:

pages/games/crash.js
```
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';

export default function CrashGame() {
  const [multiplier, setMultiplier] = useState(1.00);
  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState('idle'); // 'idle', 'running', 'crashed'
  const [bets, setBets] = useState([]);
  const [autoCashout, setAutoCashout] = useState(null);
  const [lastCrash, setLastCrash] = useState(null);
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(1000); // Starting balance
  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState('');
  const [gameHistory, setGameHistory] = useState([]);
  const router = useRouter();

  // Generate random crash point with more realistic distribution
  const generateCrashPoint = () => {
    // More realistic distribution - higher chance for lower multipliers
    const randomValue = Math.random();
    // This creates a distribution where:
    // - 50% chance for < 2x
    // - 25% chance for 2x-10x
    // - 15% chance for 10x-50x
    // - 10% chance for > 50x
    if (randomValue < 0.5) {
      return (1 + Math.random() * 1).toFixed(2); // 1.00-2.00x
    } else if (randomValue < 0.75) {
      return (2 + Math.random() * 8).toFixed(2); // 2.00-10.00x
    } else if (randomValue < 0.9) {
      return (10 + Math.random() * 40).toFixed(2); // 10.00-50.00x
    } else {
      return (50 + Math.random() * 50).toFixed(2); // 50.00-100.00x
    }
  };

  const startGame = () => {
    if (gameState !== 'idle') return;

    const newCrashPoint = parseFloat(generateCrashPoint());
    setGameState('running');
    setMultiplier(1.00);
    setLastCrash(null);

    const startTime = Date.now();
    // Slower progression - now takes 30 seconds to reach crash point
    const duration = 30000;

    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
      const progress = elapsed / duration;

      // Ease-in progression for more realistic feel
      const easedProgress = progress < 0.5 ? 2 * progress * progress : -1 + (4 - 2 * progress) * progress;
      const currentMultiplier = 1 + (newCrashPoint - 1) * easedProgress;

      setMultiplier(currentMultiplier.toFixed(2));

      // Check if any bets should auto cashout
      bets.forEach(bet => {
        if (!bet.cashedOut && bet.cashoutAt && currentMultiplier >= bet.cashoutAt) {
          cashout(bet.id, currentMultiplier);
        }
      });

      // Check if game should crash
      if (currentMultiplier >= newCrashPoint) {
        clearInterval(interval);
        setGameState('crashed');
        setLastCrash(newCrashPoint.toFixed(2));

        // Add to game history
        setGameHistory(prev => [
          { crashPoint: newCrashPoint.toFixed(2), timestamp: new Date() },
          ...prev.slice(0, 9) // Keep only last 10 games
        ]);
      }
    }, 100); // Update every 100ms instead of 50ms for smoother progression
  };

  const placeBet = () => {
    if (gameState !== 'idle') {
      alert('Please wait until the current game finishes');
      return;
    }

    const amount = parseFloat(betAmount);
    if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) {
      alert('Please enter a valid bet amount');
      return;
    }

    if (amount > balance) {
      alert('Insufficient balance');
      return;
    }

    const newBet = {
      id: Date.now(),
      amount,
      cashoutAt: autoCashout || null,
      user: 'You',
      cashedOut: false,
      cashoutMultiplier: null
    };

    setBets([...bets, newBet]);
    setBalance(balance - amount);
    setBetAmount('');
  };

  const cashout = (betId, currentMultiplier) => {
    setBets(prevBets =>
      prevBets.map(bet => {
        if (bet.id === betId && !bet.cashedOut) {
          const winnings = bet.amount * currentMultiplier;
          setBalance(prevBalance => prevBalance + winnings);
          return {
            ...bet,
            cashedOut: true,
            cashoutMultiplier: currentMultiplier
          };
        }
        return bet;
      })
    );
  };

  const cashoutAll = () => {
    if (gameState !== 'running') return;

    bets.forEach(bet => {
      if (!bet.cashedOut) {
        cashout(bet.id, multiplier);
      }
    });
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (gameState === 'crashed') {
      const timer = setTimeout(() => {
        setGameState('idle');
        // Clear bets that didn't cash out
        setBets(prevBets =>
          prevBets.filter(bet => bet.cashedOut)
        );
      }, 3000);
      return () => clearTimeout(timer);
    }
  }, [gameState]);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 text-white p-4">
      <button
        onClick={() => router.back()}
        className="mb-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"
      >
        ← Back to Games
      </button>

      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-yellow-400">CRASH</h1>
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2">
            <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">Balance:</span>
            <span className="text-white font-bold ml-2">${balance.toFixed(2)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-6xl font-bold mb-4" style={{
              color: gameState === 'crashed' ? '#ef4444' :
                     gameState === 'running' ? '#10b981' : '#fbbf24'
            }}>
              {multiplier}x
            </div>

            {gameState === 'idle' && (
              <button
                onClick={startGame}
                className="bg-yellow-500 hover:bg-yellow-600 text-black font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-lg text-lg transition-colors"
              >
                START GAME
              </button>
            )}

            {gameState === 'running' && (
              <button
                onClick={cashoutAll}
                className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-lg text-lg transition-colors"
              >
                CASH OUT ALL
              </button>
            )}

            {gameState === 'crashed' && (
              <div className="text-red-500 text-xl font-bold">
                Game crashed at {lastCrash}x
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6">
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-2">Auto Cashout</h3>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <input
                type="number"
                value={autoCashout || ''}
                onChange={(e) => setAutoCashout(parseFloat(e.target.value) || null)}
                placeholder="1.00"
                min="1.00"
                max="100.00"
                step="0.01"
                className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 flex-1"
                disabled={gameState !== 'idle'}
              />
              <span className="text-gray-400">x</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-2">Quick Bet</h3>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
              {[1, 5, 10, 25, 50, 100].map((amount) => (
                <button
                  key={amount}
                  onClick={() => {
                    setBetAmount(amount);
                    placeBet();
                  }}
                  className="bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white py-2 px-3 rounded text-sm transition-colors"
                  disabled={gameState !== 'idle' || amount > balance}
                >
                  {amount}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-2">Your Bet</h3>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <input
                type="number"
                value={betAmount}
                onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Amount"
                min="1"
                max={balance}
                className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 flex-1"
                disabled={gameState !== 'idle'}
              />
              <button
                onClick={placeBet}
                className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded transition-colors"
                disabled={gameState !== 'idle'}
              >
                Bet
              </button>
            </div>
            <div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">
              Max: ${balance.toFixed(2)}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Active Bets ({bets.length})</h3>
            {bets.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No active bets</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {bets.map((bet) => (
                  <div key={bet.id} className={`flex justify-between items-center rounded p-2 ${
                    bet.cashedOut ? 'bg-green-900/50' : 'bg-gray-700'
                  }`}>
                    <div>
                      <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">{bet.user}</span>
                      <span className="text-gray-300 ml-2">${bet.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      {bet.cashedOut ? (
                        <>
                          <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                            Cashed out at {bet.cashoutMultiplier}x
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">
                            +${(bet.amount * bet.cashoutMultiplier).toFixed(2)}
                          </span>
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        <>
                          {bet.cashoutAt && (
                            <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                              Auto: {bet.cashoutAt}x
                            </span>
                          )}
                          {!bet.cashoutAt && gameState === 'running' && (
                            <button
                              onClick={() => cashout(bet.id, multiplier)}
                              className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded transition-colors"
                            >
                              Cash Out
                            </button>
                          )}
                        </>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Game History</h3>
            {gameHistory.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No game history</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {gameHistory.map((game, index) => (
                  <div key={index} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-700 rounded p-2">
                    <span className="text-gray-300">Game #{index + 1}</span>
                    <span className={`font-bold ${
                      parseFloat(game.crashPoint) < 2 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-green-400'
                    }`}>
                      {game.crashPoint}x
                    </span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

Key changes made:

1. **Slower Multiplier Progression**:
   - Increased duration from 10,000ms to 30,000ms (30 seconds)
   - Added ease-in progression for more realistic acceleration
   - Changed update interval from 50ms to 100ms for smoother progression

2. **Removed Crash Point Preview**:
   - Removed the line that displayed "Next crash: ~{crashPoint.toFixed(2)}x"
   - The crash point is now completely hidden from players

3. **More Realistic Crash Distribution**:
   - Updated the `generateCrashPoint` function to create a more realistic distribution:
     - 50% chance for 1.00-2.00x (most common)
     - 25% chance for 2.00-10.00x
     - 15% chance for 10.00-50.00x
     - 10% chance for 50.00-100.00x
   - This makes the game less "OP" and more balanced

The game now has a more realistic feel with slower progression and proper risk/reward balance. Players won't know when the crash will happen, making it more exciting and unpredictable.

> Tokens: 13k sent, 3.1k received.  
> Applied edit to pages/games/crash.js  
> Commit d60e374 fix: adjust crash multiplier progression and remove crash point preview  
> You can use /undo to undo and discard each aider commit.

#### okay now for some reason the crash goes waay too far and then goes backwards instead of losing the bet  

I understand the issue - the crash multiplier is going beyond the crash point and then decreasing, which shouldn't happen. Let me fix the Crash game logic:

pages/games/crash.js
```
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';

export default function CrashGame() {
  const [multiplier, setMultiplier] = useState(1.00);
  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState('idle'); // 'idle', 'running', 'crashed'
  const [bets, setBets] = useState([]);
  const [autoCashout, setAutoCashout] = useState(null);
  const [lastCrash, setLastCrash] = useState(null);
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(1000); // Starting balance
  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState('');
  const [gameHistory, setGameHistory] = useState([]);
  const router = useRouter();

  // Generate random crash point with more realistic distribution
  const generateCrashPoint = () => {
    // More realistic distribution - higher chance for lower multipliers
    const randomValue = Math.random();
    // This creates a distribution where:
    // - 50% chance for < 2x
    // - 25% chance for 2x-10x
    // - 15% chance for 10x-50x
    // - 10% chance for > 50x
    if (randomValue < 0.5) {
      return (1 + Math.random() * 1).toFixed(2); // 1.00-2.00x
    } else if (randomValue < 0.75) {
      return (2 + Math.random() * 8).toFixed(2); // 2.00-10.00x
    } else if (randomValue < 0.9) {
      return (10 + Math.random() * 40).toFixed(2); // 10.00-50.00x
    } else {
      return (50 + Math.random() * 50).toFixed(2); // 50.00-100.00x
    }
  };

  const startGame = () => {
    if (gameState !== 'idle') return;

    const newCrashPoint = parseFloat(generateCrashPoint());
    setGameState('running');
    setMultiplier(1.00);
    setLastCrash(null);

    const startTime = Date.now();
    // Slower progression - now takes 30 seconds to reach crash point
    const duration = 30000;

    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
      const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1); // Ensure progress doesn't exceed 1

      // Ease-in progression for more realistic feel
      const easedProgress = progress < 0.5 ? 2 * progress * progress : -1 + (4 - 2 * progress) * progress;
      const currentMultiplier = 1 + (newCrashPoint - 1) * easedProgress;

      setMultiplier(currentMultiplier.toFixed(2));

      // Check if any bets should auto cashout
      bets.forEach(bet => {
        if (!bet.cashedOut && bet.cashoutAt && currentMultiplier >= bet.cashoutAt) {
          cashout(bet.id, currentMultiplier);
        }
      });

      // Check if game should crash
      if (progress >= 1 || currentMultiplier >= newCrashPoint) {
        clearInterval(interval);
        setGameState('crashed');
        setLastCrash(newCrashPoint.toFixed(2));

        // Add to game history
        setGameHistory(prev => [
          { crashPoint: newCrashPoint.toFixed(2), timestamp: new Date() },
          ...prev.slice(0, 9) // Keep only last 10 games
        ]);
      }
    }, 100); // Update every 100ms instead of 50ms for smoother progression
  };

  const placeBet = () => {
    if (gameState !== 'idle') {
      alert('Please wait until the current game finishes');
      return;
    }

    const amount = parseFloat(betAmount);
    if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) {
      alert('Please enter a valid bet amount');
      return;
    }

    if (amount > balance) {
      alert('Insufficient balance');
      return;
    }

    const newBet = {
      id: Date.now(),
      amount,
      cashoutAt: autoCashout || null,
      user: 'You',
      cashedOut: false,
      cashoutMultiplier: null
    };

    setBets([...bets, newBet]);
    setBalance(balance - amount);
    setBetAmount('');
  };

  const cashout = (betId, currentMultiplier) => {
    setBets(prevBets =>
      prevBets.map(bet => {
        if (bet.id === betId && !bet.cashedOut) {
          const winnings = bet.amount * currentMultiplier;
          setBalance(prevBalance => prevBalance + winnings);
          return {
            ...bet,
            cashedOut: true,
            cashoutMultiplier: currentMultiplier
          };
        }
        return bet;
      })
    );
  };

  const cashoutAll = () => {
    if (gameState !== 'running') return;

    bets.forEach(bet => {
      if (!bet.cashedOut) {
        cashout(bet.id, multiplier);
      }
    });
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (gameState === 'crashed') {
      const timer = setTimeout(() => {
        setGameState('idle');
        // Clear bets that didn't cash out
        setBets(prevBets =>
          prevBets.filter(bet => bet.cashedOut)
        );
      }, 3000);
      return () => clearTimeout(timer);
    }
  }, [gameState]);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 text-white p-4">
      <button
        onClick={() => router.back()}
        className="mb-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"
      >
        ← Back to Games
      </button>

      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-yellow-400">CRASH</h1>
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2">
            <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">Balance:</span>
            <span className="text-white font-bold ml-2">${balance.toFixed(2)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-6xl font-bold mb-4" style={{
              color: gameState === 'crashed' ? '#ef4444' :
                     gameState === 'running' ? '#10b981' : '#fbbf24'
            }}>
              {multiplier}x
            </div>

            {gameState === 'idle' && (
              <button
                onClick={startGame}
                className="bg-yellow-500 hover:bg-yellow-600 text-black font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-lg text-lg transition-colors"
              >
                START GAME
              </button>
            )}

            {gameState === 'running' && (
              <button
                onClick={cashoutAll}
                className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-lg text-lg transition-colors"
              >
                CASH OUT ALL
              </button>
            )}

            {gameState === 'crashed' && (
              <div className="text-red-500 text-xl font-bold">
                Game crashed at {lastCrash}x
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-6">
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-2">Auto Cashout</h3>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <input
                type="number"
                value={autoCashout || ''}
                onChange={(e) => setAutoCashout(parseFloat(e.target.value) || null)}
                placeholder="1.00"
                min="1.00"
                max="100.00"
                step="0.01"
                className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 flex-1"
                disabled={gameState !== 'idle'}
              />
              <span className="text-gray-400">x</span>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-2">Quick Bet</h3>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
              {[1, 5, 10, 25, 50, 100].map((amount) => (
                <button
                  key={amount}
                  onClick={() => {
                    setBetAmount(amount);
                    placeBet();
                  }}
                  className="bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 text-white py-2 px-3 rounded text-sm transition-colors"
                  disabled={gameState !== 'idle' || amount > balance}
                >
                  {amount}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-2">Your Bet</h3>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <input
                type="number"
                value={betAmount}
                onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Amount"
                min="1"
                max={balance}
                className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 flex-1"
                disabled={gameState !== 'idle'}
              />
              <button
                onClick={placeBet}
                className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded transition-colors"
                disabled={gameState !== 'idle'}
              >
                Bet
              </button>
            </div>
            <div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">
              Max: ${balance.toFixed(2)}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Active Bets ({bets.length})</h3>
            {bets.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No active bets</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {bets.map((bet) => (
                  <div key={bet.id} className={`flex justify-between items-center rounded p-2 ${
                    bet.cashedOut ? 'bg-green-900/50' : 'bg-gray-700'
                  }`}>
                    <div>
                      <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">{bet.user}</span>
                      <span className="text-gray-300 ml-2">${bet.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      {bet.cashedOut ? (
                        <>
                          <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                            Cashed out at {bet.cashoutMultiplier}x
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">
                            +${(bet.amount * bet.cashoutMultiplier).toFixed(2)}
                          </span>
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        <>
                          {bet.cashoutAt && (
                            <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                              Auto: {bet.cashoutAt}x
                            </span>
                          )}
                          {!bet.cashoutAt && gameState === 'running' && (
                            <button
                              onClick={() => cashout(bet.id, multiplier)}
                              className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded transition-colors"
                            >
                              Cash Out
                            </button>
                          )}
                        </>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Game History</h3>
            {gameHistory.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No game history</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {gameHistory.map((game, index) => (
                  <div key={index} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-700 rounded p-2">
                    <span className="text-gray-300">Game #{index + 1}</span>
                    <span className={`font-bold ${
                      parseFloat(game.crashPoint) < 2 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-green-400'
                    }`}>
                      {game.crashPoint}x
                    </span>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

Key fixes made:

1. **Fixed the crash point logic**:
   - Added `Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1)` to ensure progress never exceeds 1
   - Changed the crash condition to check both `progress >= 1` AND `currentMultiplier >= newCrashPoint`
   - This prevents the multiplier from going beyond the crash point

2. **Improved the crash detection**:
   - The game now properly stops when either the time runs out OR the multiplier reaches the crash point
   - This ensures the multiplier never goes backwards or exceeds the intended crash point

The game should now work correctly - the multiplier will increase smoothly until it hits the crash point, then the game will end immediately without the multiplier going backwards or beyond the intended crash value.
