#### ## Error Type  
#### Recoverable Error  
####   
#### ## Error Message  
#### Text content does not match server-rendered HTML.  
####   
#### Next.js version: 16.1.3 (Turbopack)  

The error "Text content does not match server-rendered HTML" typically occurs in Next.js when there's a mismatch between the server-rendered content and the client-side rendered content. This often happens with dynamic content that changes between server and client rendering.

Looking at the files, the most likely culprit is the Crash game page (`pages/games/crash.js`) because it uses a client-side game service that maintains state. Let me fix this by ensuring the initial render matches on both server and client:

pages/games/crash.js
```
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';

// Mock backend service for shared game state
const CrashGameService = {
  // In a real app, this would connect to a WebSocket or API
  gameState: 'waiting',
  currentMultiplier: 1.00,
  lastCrashPoint: null,
  players: [],
  gameHistory: [],
  subscribers: [],
  initialized: false,

  subscribe(callback) {
    this.subscribers.push(callback);
    return () => {
      this.subscribers = this.subscribers.filter(sub => sub !== callback);
    };
  },

  notifySubscribers() {
    this.subscribers.forEach(callback => callback());
  },

  startNewGame() {
    this.gameState = 'betting';
    this.currentMultiplier = 1.00;
    this.notifySubscribers();

    // 10 second betting period
    setTimeout(() => {
      this.gameState = 'running';
      this.lastCrashPoint = this.generateCrashPoint();
      this.notifySubscribers();

      // Game runs for up to 30 seconds
      const startTime = Date.now();
      const duration = 30000;

      const interval = setInterval(() => {
        const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
        const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
        const easedProgress = progress < 0.5 ? 2 * progress * progress : -1 + (4 - 2 * progress) * progress;
        this.currentMultiplier = 1 + (this.lastCrashPoint - 1) * easedProgress;

        // Round the multiplier to 2 decimal places
        this.currentMultiplier = Math.round(this.currentMultiplier * 100) / 100;

        // Check if game should crash
        if (progress >= 1 || this.currentMultiplier >= this.lastCrashPoint) {
          clearInterval(interval);
          this.gameState = 'crashed';
          this.gameHistory.unshift({
            crashPoint: this.lastCrashPoint,
            timestamp: new Date(),
            players: this.players.length
          });
          this.gameHistory = this.gameHistory.slice(0, 10); // Keep last 10 games

          // Clear players who didn't cash out
          this.players = this.players.filter(p => p.cashedOut);

          this.notifySubscribers();

          // Start new game after 5 seconds
          setTimeout(() => {
            this.startNewGame();
          }, 5000);
        } else {
          this.notifySubscribers();
        }
      }, 100);
    }, 10000);
  },

  generateCrashPoint() {
    const randomValue = Math.random();
    if (randomValue < 0.5) {
      return parseFloat((1 + Math.random() * 1).toFixed(2));
    } else if (randomValue < 0.75) {
      return parseFloat((2 + Math.random() * 8).toFixed(2));
    } else if (randomValue < 0.9) {
      return parseFloat((10 + Math.random() * 40).toFixed(2));
    } else {
      return parseFloat((50 + Math.random() * 50).toFixed(2));
    }
  }
};

export default function CrashGame() {
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(1000);
  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState('');
  const [autoCashout, setAutoCashout] = useState(null);
  const [playerBets, setPlayerBets] = useState([]);
  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState('waiting');
  const [multiplier, setMultiplier] = useState(1.00);
  const [lastCrash, setLastCrash] = useState(null);
  const [gameHistory, setGameHistory] = useState([]);
  const [players, setPlayers] = useState([]);
  const router = useRouter();

  // Initialize game service on client side only
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!CrashGameService.initialized && typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      CrashGameService.initialized = true;
      CrashGameService.startNewGame();
    }

    const unsubscribe = CrashGameService.subscribe(() => {
      setGameState(CrashGameService.gameState);
      setMultiplier(CrashGameService.currentMultiplier);
      setLastCrash(CrashGameService.lastCrashPoint);
      setGameHistory([...CrashGameService.gameHistory]);
      setPlayers([...CrashGameService.players]);
    });

    return unsubscribe;
  }, []);

  const placeBet = () => {
    const amount = parseFloat(betAmount);
    if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) {
      alert('Please enter a valid bet amount');
      return;
    }

    if (amount > balance) {
      alert('Insufficient balance');
      return;
    }

    if (gameState !== 'betting') {
      alert('You can only bet during the betting period');
      return;
    }

    const newBet = {
      id: Date.now(),
      playerId: 'player-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
      amount,
      cashoutAt: autoCashout || null,
      cashedOut: false,
      cashoutMultiplier: null,
      timestamp: new Date()
    };

    // Add to game service
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      CrashGameService.players.push(newBet);
      CrashGameService.notifySubscribers();
    }

    // Update local state
    setPlayerBets([...playerBets, newBet]);
    setBalance(balance - amount);
    setBetAmount('');
  };

  const cashout = (betId) => {
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      const bet = CrashGameService.players.find(b => b.id === betId && !b.cashedOut);
      if (bet) {
        bet.cashedOut = true;
        bet.cashoutMultiplier = multiplier;
        setBalance(prev => prev + (bet.amount * multiplier));
        CrashGameService.notifySubscribers();
      }
    }
  };

  const cashoutAll = () => {
    playerBets.forEach(bet => {
      if (!bet.cashedOut) {
        cashout(bet.id);
      }
    });
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 text-white p-4">
      <button
        onClick={() => router.back()}
        className="mb-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"
      >
        ← Back to Games
      </button>

      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-yellow-400">CRASH</h1>
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2">
            <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">Balance:</span>
            <span className="text-white font-bold ml-2">${balance.toFixed(2)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-6xl font-bold mb-4" style={{
              color: gameState === 'crashed' ? '#ef4444' :
                     gameState === 'running' ? '#10b981' :
                     gameState === 'betting' ? '#fbbf24' : '#6b7280'
            }}>
              {gameState === 'waiting' ? '--.--' : multiplier.toFixed(2)}x
            </div>

            <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4">
              {gameState === 'waiting' && 'Waiting for next round...'}
              {gameState === 'betting' && `Betting period (${10 - Math.floor((Date.now() % 10000) / 1000)}s left)`}
              {gameState === 'running' && 'Game in progress...'}
              {gameState === 'crashed' && `Game crashed at ${lastCrash}x`}
            </div>

            {gameState === 'betting' && (
              <div className="flex justify-center gap-4 mb-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={betAmount}
                    onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="Amount"
                    min="1"
                    max={balance}
                    className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 w-32"
                  />
                  <button
                    onClick={placeBet}
                    className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded transition-colors"
                  >
                    Place Bet
                  </button>
                </div>

                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={autoCashout || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => setAutoCashout(parseFloat(e.target.value) || null)}
                    placeholder="Auto"
                    min="1.00"
                    max="100.00"
                    step="0.01"
                    className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 w-20"
                  />
                  <span className="text-gray-400">x</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {gameState === 'running' && (
              <button
                onClick={cashoutAll}
                className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-lg text-lg transition-colors"
              >
                CASH OUT ALL
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-6">
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Your Bets ({playerBets.length})</h3>
            {playerBets.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No active bets</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {playerBets.map((bet) => (
                  <div key={bet.id} className={`flex justify-between items-center rounded p-2 ${
                    bet.cashedOut ? 'bg-green-900/50' : 'bg-gray-700'
                  }`}>
                    <div>
                      <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">You</span>
                      <span className="text-gray-300 ml-2">${bet.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
                      {bet.cashoutAt && <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">(Auto: {bet.cashoutAt}x)</span>}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      {bet.cashedOut ? (
                        <>
                          <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                            Cashed out at {bet.cashoutMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">
                            +${(bet.amount * bet.cashoutMultiplier).toFixed(2)}
                          </span>
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        gameState === 'running' && (
                          <button
                            onClick={() => cashout(bet.id)}
                            className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded transition-colors"
                          >
                            Cash Out
                          </button>
                        )
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">All Players ({players.length})</h3>
            {players.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No active players</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto">
                {players.map((player) => (
                  <div key={player.id} className={`flex justify-between items-center rounded p-2 ${
                    player.cashedOut ? 'bg-green-900/50' : 'bg-gray-700'
                  }`}>
                    <div>
                      <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">{player.playerId.substring(0, 6)}...</span>
                      <span className="text-gray-300 ml-2">${player.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
                      {player.cashoutAt && <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">(Auto: {player.cashoutAt}x)</span>}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      {player.cashedOut ? (
                        <>
                          <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                            Cashed out at {player.cashoutMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">
                            +${(player.amount * player.cashoutMultiplier).toFixed(2)}
                          </span>
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        gameState === 'crashed' && (
                          <span className="text-red-400 text-sm">Lost</span>
                        )
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
          <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Game History</h3>
          {gameHistory.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No game history</p>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {gameHistory.map((game, index) => (
                <div key={index} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-700 rounded p-2">
                  <div>
                    <span className="text-gray-300">Game #{index + 1}</span>
                    <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">({game.players} players)</span>
                  </div>
                  <span className={`font-bold ${
                    parseFloat(game.crashPoint) < 2 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-green-400'
                  }`}>
                    {game.crashPoint}x
                  </span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

Key changes made to fix the hydration error:

1. **Added initialization check**: Added an `initialized` flag to ensure the game service only starts on the client side
2. **Client-side only operations**: Wrapped all game service operations in `typeof window !== 'undefined'` checks
3. **Default state values**: Set initial state values that match what would be rendered on the server
4. **Fixed crash point generation**: Changed to return numbers instead of strings to avoid type mismatches

The error should now be resolved as the initial server render will match the client-side render. The game will start and run only on the client side after hydration is complete.

> Tokens: 90k sent, 3.3k received.

> Commit 54b602e fix: resolve hydration mismatch by initializing game state on client-side only  
> You can use /undo to undo and discard each aider commit.

I'll fix the betting issue in the Crash game. The problem is likely that the game state isn't properly synchronized or the betting period isn't working correctly. Here's the updated file:

pages/games/crash.js
```
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';

// Mock backend service for shared game state
const CrashGameService = {
  // In a real app, this would connect to a WebSocket or API
  gameState: 'waiting',
  currentMultiplier: 1.00,
  lastCrashPoint: null,
  players: [],
  gameHistory: [],
  subscribers: [],
  initialized: false,
  bettingTimer: null,
  gameTimer: null,
  cooldownTimer: null,

  subscribe(callback) {
    this.subscribers.push(callback);
    return () => {
      this.subscribers = this.subscribers.filter(sub => sub !== callback);
    };
  },

  notifySubscribers() {
    this.subscribers.forEach(callback => callback());
  },

  startNewGame() {
    // Clear any existing timers
    if (this.bettingTimer) clearTimeout(this.bettingTimer);
    if (this.gameTimer) clearInterval(this.gameTimer);
    if (this.cooldownTimer) clearTimeout(this.cooldownTimer);

    this.gameState = 'betting';
    this.currentMultiplier = 1.00;
    this.notifySubscribers();

    // Start betting countdown
    let bettingTimeLeft = 10;
    this.bettingTimer = setInterval(() => {
      bettingTimeLeft--;
      this.notifySubscribers();

      if (bettingTimeLeft <= 0) {
        clearInterval(this.bettingTimer);
        this.startGameRound();
      }
    }, 1000);
  },

  startGameRound() {
    this.gameState = 'running';
    this.lastCrashPoint = this.generateCrashPoint();
    this.notifySubscribers();

    // Game runs for up to 30 seconds
    const startTime = Date.now();
    const duration = 30000;

    this.gameTimer = setInterval(() => {
      const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
      const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
      const easedProgress = progress < 0.5 ? 2 * progress * progress : -1 + (4 - 2 * progress) * progress;
      this.currentMultiplier = 1 + (this.lastCrashPoint - 1) * easedProgress;

      // Round the multiplier to 2 decimal places
      this.currentMultiplier = Math.round(this.currentMultiplier * 100) / 100;

      // Check if game should crash
      if (progress >= 1 || this.currentMultiplier >= this.lastCrashPoint) {
        clearInterval(this.gameTimer);
        this.gameState = 'crashed';
        this.gameHistory.unshift({
          crashPoint: this.lastCrashPoint,
          timestamp: new Date(),
          players: this.players.length
        });
        this.gameHistory = this.gameHistory.slice(0, 10); // Keep last 10 games

        // Clear players who didn't cash out
        this.players = this.players.filter(p => p.cashedOut);

        this.notifySubscribers();

        // Start cooldown before next game
        this.cooldownTimer = setTimeout(() => {
          this.startNewGame();
        }, 5000);
      } else {
        this.notifySubscribers();
      }
    }, 100);
  },

  generateCrashPoint() {
    const randomValue = Math.random();
    if (randomValue < 0.5) {
      return parseFloat((1 + Math.random() * 1).toFixed(2));
    } else if (randomValue < 0.75) {
      return parseFloat((2 + Math.random() * 8).toFixed(2));
    } else if (randomValue < 0.9) {
      return parseFloat((10 + Math.random() * 40).toFixed(2));
    } else {
      return parseFloat((50 + Math.random() * 50).toFixed(2));
    }
  }
};

export default function CrashGame() {
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(1000);
  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState('');
  const [autoCashout, setAutoCashout] = useState(null);
  const [playerBets, setPlayerBets] = useState([]);
  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState('waiting');
  const [multiplier, setMultiplier] = useState(1.00);
  const [lastCrash, setLastCrash] = useState(null);
  const [gameHistory, setGameHistory] = useState([]);
  const [players, setPlayers] = useState([]);
  const [bettingTimeLeft, setBettingTimeLeft] = useState(10);
  const router = useRouter();

  // Initialize game service on client side only
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!CrashGameService.initialized && typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      CrashGameService.initialized = true;
      CrashGameService.startNewGame();
    }

    const unsubscribe = CrashGameService.subscribe(() => {
      setGameState(CrashGameService.gameState);
      setMultiplier(CrashGameService.currentMultiplier);
      setLastCrash(CrashGameService.lastCrashPoint);
      setGameHistory([...CrashGameService.gameHistory]);
      setPlayers([...CrashGameService.players]);

      // Update betting timer display
      if (CrashGameService.gameState === 'betting') {
        const startTime = Date.now() - (10000 - bettingTimeLeft * 1000);
        const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
        const timeLeft = Math.max(0, Math.ceil((10000 - elapsed) / 1000));
        setBettingTimeLeft(timeLeft);
      }
    });

    return unsubscribe;
  }, [bettingTimeLeft]);

  const placeBet = () => {
    const amount = parseFloat(betAmount);
    if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) {
      alert('Please enter a valid bet amount');
      return;
    }

    if (amount > balance) {
      alert('Insufficient balance');
      return;
    }

    if (gameState !== 'betting') {
      alert(`You can only bet during the betting period. Current state: ${gameState}`);
      return;
    }

    const newBet = {
      id: Date.now(),
      playerId: 'player-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
      amount,
      cashoutAt: autoCashout || null,
      cashedOut: false,
      cashoutMultiplier: null,
      timestamp: new Date()
    };

    // Add to game service
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      CrashGameService.players.push(newBet);
      CrashGameService.notifySubscribers();
    }

    // Update local state
    setPlayerBets([...playerBets, newBet]);
    setBalance(balance - amount);
    setBetAmount('');
  };

  const cashout = (betId) => {
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      const bet = CrashGameService.players.find(b => b.id === betId && !b.cashedOut);
      if (bet) {
        bet.cashedOut = true;
        bet.cashoutMultiplier = multiplier;
        setBalance(prev => prev + (bet.amount * multiplier));
        CrashGameService.notifySubscribers();
      }
    }
  };

  const cashoutAll = () => {
    playerBets.forEach(bet => {
      if (!bet.cashedOut) {
        cashout(bet.id);
      }
    });
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 text-white p-4">
      <button
        onClick={() => router.back()}
        className="mb-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"
      >
        ← Back to Games
      </button>

      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-yellow-400">CRASH</h1>
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2">
            <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">Balance:</span>
            <span className="text-white font-bold ml-2">${balance.toFixed(2)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-6xl font-bold mb-4" style={{
              color: gameState === 'crashed' ? '#ef4444' :
                     gameState === 'running' ? '#10b981' :
                     gameState === 'betting' ? '#fbbf24' : '#6b7280'
            }}>
              {gameState === 'waiting' ? '--.--' : multiplier.toFixed(2)}x
            </div>

            <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4">
              {gameState === 'waiting' && 'Waiting for next round...'}
              {gameState === 'betting' && `Betting period (${bettingTimeLeft}s left)`}
              {gameState === 'running' && 'Game in progress...'}
              {gameState === 'crashed' && `Game crashed at ${lastCrash}x`}
            </div>

            {gameState === 'betting' && (
              <div className="flex justify-center gap-4 mb-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={betAmount}
                    onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="Amount"
                    min="1"
                    max={balance}
                    className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 w-32"
                  />
                  <button
                    onClick={placeBet}
                    className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded transition-colors"
                  >
                    Place Bet
                  </button>
                </div>

                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={autoCashout || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => setAutoCashout(parseFloat(e.target.value) || null)}
                    placeholder="Auto"
                    min="1.00"
                    max="100.00"
                    step="0.01"
                    className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 w-20"
                  />
                  <span className="text-gray-400">x</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {gameState === 'running' && (
              <button
                onClick={cashoutAll}
                className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-lg text-lg transition-colors"
              >
                CASH OUT ALL
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-6">
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Your Bets ({playerBets.length})</h3>
            {playerBets.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No active bets</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {playerBets.map((bet) => (
                  <div key={bet.id} className={`flex justify-between items-center rounded p-2 ${
                    bet.cashedOut ? 'bg-green-900/50' : 'bg-gray-700'
                  }`}>
                    <div>
                      <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">You</span>
                      <span className="text-gray-300 ml-2">${bet.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
                      {bet.cashoutAt && <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">(Auto: {bet.cashoutAt}x)</span>}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      {bet.cashedOut ? (
                        <>
                          <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                            Cashed out at {bet.cashoutMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">
                            +${(bet.amount * bet.cashoutMultiplier).toFixed(2)}
                          </span>
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        gameState === 'running' && (
                          <button
                            onClick={() => cashout(bet.id)}
                            className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded transition-colors"
                          >
                            Cash Out
                          </button>
                        )
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">All Players ({players.length})</h3>
            {players.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No active players</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto">
                {players.map((player) => (
                  <div key={player.id} className={`flex justify-between items-center rounded p-2 ${
                    player.cashedOut ? 'bg-green-900/50' : 'bg-gray-700'
                  }`}>
                    <div>
                      <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">{player.playerId.substring(0, 6)}...</span>
                      <span className="text-gray-300 ml-2">${player.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
                      {player.cashoutAt && <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">(Auto: {player.cashoutAt}x)</span>}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      {player.cashedOut ? (
                        <>
                          <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                            Cashed out at {player.cashoutMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">
                            +${(player.amount * player.cashoutMultiplier).toFixed(2)}
                          </span>
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        gameState === 'crashed' && (
                          <span className="text-red-400 text-sm">Lost</span>
                        )
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
          <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Game History</h3>
          {gameHistory.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No game history</p>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {gameHistory.map((game, index) => (
                <div key={index} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-700 rounded p-2">
                  <div>
                    <span className="text-gray-300">Game #{index + 1}</span>
                    <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">({game.players} players)</span>
                  </div>
                  <span className={`font-bold ${
                    parseFloat(game.crashPoint) < 2 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-green-400'
                  }`}>
                    {game.crashPoint}x
                  </span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

Key improvements made to fix the betting issue:

1. **Fixed timer management**: Added proper timer cleanup and separate timers for betting, game, and cooldown phases
2. **Added betting countdown**: Implemented a proper 10-second betting period with visual countdown
3. **Improved game state transitions**: Better handling of state changes between waiting, betting, running, and crashed states
4. **Better error feedback**: More descriptive error messages when betting is not allowed
5. **Fixed state synchronization**: Ensured the game state properly updates and notifies subscribers

The game should now:
- Start in waiting state
- Transition to betting state with a 10-second countdown
- Allow bets only during the betting period
- Show accurate time remaining for betting
- Properly transition through all game states
- Clean up timers to prevent memory leaks

Try placing bets during the betting period - it should work now!

pages/games/crash.js
```
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';

// Mock backend service for shared game state
const CrashGameService = {
  // In a real app, this would connect to a WebSocket or API
  gameState: 'waiting',
  currentMultiplier: 1.00,
  lastCrashPoint: null,
  players: [],
  gameHistory: [],
  subscribers: [],
  initialized: false,
  bettingTimer: null,
  gameTimer: null,
  cooldownTimer: null,

  subscribe(callback) {
    this.subscribers.push(callback);
    return () => {
      this.subscribers = this.subscribers.filter(sub => sub !== callback);
    };
  },

  notifySubscribers() {
    this.subscribers.forEach(callback => callback());
  },

  startNewGame() {
    // Clear any existing timers
    if (this.bettingTimer) clearTimeout(this.bettingTimer);
    if (this.gameTimer) clearInterval(this.gameTimer);
    if (this.cooldownTimer) clearTimeout(this.cooldownTimer);

    this.gameState = 'betting';
    this.currentMultiplier = 1.00;
    this.notifySubscribers();

    // Start betting countdown
    let bettingTimeLeft = 10;
    this.bettingTimer = setInterval(() => {
      bettingTimeLeft--;
      this.notifySubscribers();

      if (bettingTimeLeft <= 0) {
        clearInterval(this.bettingTimer);
        this.startGameRound();
      }
    }, 1000);
  },

  startGameRound() {
    this.gameState = 'running';
    this.lastCrashPoint = this.generateCrashPoint();
    this.notifySubscribers();

    // Game runs for up to 30 seconds
    const startTime = Date.now();
    const duration = 30000;

    this.gameTimer = setInterval(() => {
      const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
      const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
      const easedProgress = progress < 0.5 ? 2 * progress * progress : -1 + (4 - 2 * progress) * progress;
      this.currentMultiplier = 1 + (this.lastCrashPoint - 1) * easedProgress;

      // Round the multiplier to 2 decimal places
      this.currentMultiplier = Math.round(this.currentMultiplier * 100) / 100;

      // Check if game should crash
      if (progress >= 1 || this.currentMultiplier >= this.lastCrashPoint) {
        clearInterval(this.gameTimer);
        this.gameState = 'crashed';
        this.gameHistory.unshift({
          crashPoint: this.lastCrashPoint,
          timestamp: new Date(),
          players: this.players.length
        });
        this.gameHistory = this.gameHistory.slice(0, 10); // Keep last 10 games

        // Clear players who didn't cash out
        this.players = this.players.filter(p => p.cashedOut);

        this.notifySubscribers();

        // Start cooldown before next game
        this.cooldownTimer = setTimeout(() => {
          this.startNewGame();
        }, 5000);
      } else {
        this.notifySubscribers();
      }
    }, 100);
  },

  generateCrashPoint() {
    const randomValue = Math.random();
    if (randomValue < 0.5) {
      return parseFloat((1 + Math.random() * 1).toFixed(2));
    } else if (randomValue < 0.75) {
      return parseFloat((2 + Math.random() * 8).toFixed(2));
    } else if (randomValue < 0.9) {
      return parseFloat((10 + Math.random() * 40).toFixed(2));
    } else {
      return parseFloat((50 + Math.random() * 50).toFixed(2));
    }
  }
};

export default function CrashGame() {
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(1000);
  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState('');
  const [autoCashout, setAutoCashout] = useState(null);
  const [playerBets, setPlayerBets] = useState([]);
  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState('waiting');
  const [multiplier, setMultiplier] = useState(1.00);
  const [lastCrash, setLastCrash] = useState(null);
  const [gameHistory, setGameHistory] = useState([]);
  const [players, setPlayers] = useState([]);
  const [bettingTimeLeft, setBettingTimeLeft] = useState(10);
  const router = useRouter();

  // Initialize game service on client side only
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!CrashGameService.initialized && typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      CrashGameService.initialized = true;
      CrashGameService.startNewGame();
    }

    const unsubscribe = CrashGameService.subscribe(() => {
      setGameState(CrashGameService.gameState);
      setMultiplier(CrashGameService.currentMultiplier);
      setLastCrash(CrashGameService.lastCrashPoint);
      setGameHistory([...CrashGameService.gameHistory]);
      setPlayers([...CrashGameService.players]);

      // Update betting timer display
      if (CrashGameService.gameState === 'betting') {
        const startTime = Date.now() - (10000 - bettingTimeLeft * 1000);
        const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
        const timeLeft = Math.max(0, Math.ceil((10000 - elapsed) / 1000));
        setBettingTimeLeft(timeLeft);
      }
    });

    return unsubscribe;
  }, [bettingTimeLeft]);

  const placeBet = () => {
    const amount = parseFloat(betAmount);
    if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) {
      alert('Please enter a valid bet amount');
      return;
    }

    if (amount > balance) {
      alert('Insufficient balance');
      return;
    }

    if (gameState !== 'betting') {
      alert(`You can only bet during the betting period. Current state: ${gameState}`);
      return;
    }

    const newBet = {
      id: Date.now(),
      playerId: 'player-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
      amount,
      cashoutAt: autoCashout || null,
      cashedOut: false,
      cashoutMultiplier: null,
      timestamp: new Date()
    };

    // Add to game service
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      CrashGameService.players.push(newBet);
      CrashGameService.notifySubscribers();
    }

    // Update local state
    setPlayerBets([...playerBets, newBet]);
    setBalance(balance - amount);
    setBetAmount('');
  };

  const cashout = (betId) => {
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      const bet = CrashGameService.players.find(b => b.id === betId && !b.cashedOut);
      if (bet) {
        bet.cashedOut = true;
        bet.cashoutMultiplier = multiplier;
        setBalance(prev => prev + (bet.amount * multiplier));
        CrashGameService.notifySubscribers();
      }
    }
  };

  const cashoutAll = () => {
    playerBets.forEach(bet => {
      if (!bet.cashedOut) {
        cashout(bet.id);
      }
    });
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 text-white p-4">
      <button
        onClick={() => router.back()}
        className="mb-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"
      >
        ← Back to Games
      </button>

      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-yellow-400">CRASH</h1>
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2">
            <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">Balance:</span>
            <span className="text-white font-bold ml-2">${balance.toFixed(2)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-6xl font-bold mb-4" style={{
              color: gameState === 'crashed' ? '#ef4444' :
                     gameState === 'running' ? '#10b981' :
                     gameState === 'betting' ? '#fbbf24' : '#6b7280'
            }}>
              {gameState === 'waiting' ? '--.--' : multiplier.toFixed(2)}x
            </div>

            <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4">
              {gameState === 'waiting' && 'Waiting for next round...'}
              {gameState === 'betting' && `Betting period (${bettingTimeLeft}s left)`}
              {gameState === 'running' && 'Game in progress...'}
              {gameState === 'crashed' && `Game crashed at ${lastCrash}x`}
            </div>

            {gameState === 'betting' && (
              <div className="flex justify-center gap-4 mb-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={betAmount}
                    onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="Amount"
                    min="1"
                    max={balance}
                    className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 w-32"
                  />
                  <button
                    onClick={placeBet}
                    className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded transition-colors"
                  >
                    Place Bet
                  </button>
                </div>

                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={autoCashout || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => setAutoCashout(parseFloat(e.target.value) || null)}
                    placeholder="Auto"
                    min="1.00"
                    max="100.00"
                    step="0.01"
                    className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 w-20"
                  />
                  <span className="text-gray-400">x</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {gameState === 'running' && playerBets.length > 0 && (
              <button
                onClick={cashoutAll}
                className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-lg text-lg transition-colors"
              >
                CASH OUT ALL
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-6">
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Your Bets ({playerBets.length})</h3>
            {playerBets.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No active bets</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {playerBets.map((bet) => (
                  <div key={bet.id} className={`flex justify-between items-center rounded p-2 ${
                    bet.cashedOut ? 'bg-green-900/50' : 'bg-gray-700'
                  }`}>
                    <div>
                      <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">You</span>
                      <span className="text-gray-300 ml-2">${bet.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
                      {bet.cashoutAt && <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">(Auto: {bet.cashoutAt}x)</span>}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      {bet.cashedOut ? (
                        <>
                          <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                            Cashed out at {bet.cashoutMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">
                            +${(bet.amount * bet.cashoutMultiplier).toFixed(2)}
                          </span>
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        gameState === 'running' && (
                          <button
                            onClick={() => cashout(bet.id)}
                            className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded transition-colors"
                          >
                            Cash Out
                          </button>
                        )
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">All Players ({players.length})</h3>
            {players.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No active players</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto">
                {players.map((player) => (
                  <div key={player.id} className={`flex justify-between items-center rounded p-2 ${
                    player.cashedOut ? 'bg-green-900/50' : 'bg-gray-700'
                  }`}>
                    <div>
                      <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">{player.playerId.substring(0, 6)}...</span>
                      <span className="text-gray-300 ml-2">${player.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
                      {player.cashoutAt && <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">(Auto: {player.cashoutAt}x)</span>}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      {player.cashedOut ? (
                        <>
                          <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                            Cashed out at {player.cashoutMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">
                            +${(player.amount * player.cashoutMultiplier).toFixed(2)}
                          </span>
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        gameState === 'crashed' && (
                          <span className="text-red-400 text-sm">Lost</span>
                        )
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
          <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Game History</h3>
          {gameHistory.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No game history</p>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {gameHistory.map((game, index) => (
                <div key={index} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-700 rounded p-2">
                  <div>
                    <span className="text-gray-300">Game #{index + 1}</span>
                    <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">({game.players} players)</span>
                  </div>
                  <span className={`font-bold ${
                    parseFloat(game.crashPoint) < 2 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-green-400'
                  }`}>
                    {game.crashPoint}x
                  </span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

I've modified the Crash game to hide the "CASH OUT ALL" button when the player has no active bets. The key change is on line 207 where I added a condition to only show the button when `playerBets.length > 0`:

```javascript
{gameState === 'running' && playerBets.length > 0 && (
  <button
    onClick={cashoutAll}
    className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-lg text-lg transition-colors"
  >
    CASH OUT ALL
  </button>
)}
```

This ensures the cash out button is only visible during the running state AND when the player actually has bets placed.

```
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';

// Mock backend service for shared game state
const CrashGameService = {
  // In a real app, this would connect to a WebSocket or API
  gameState: 'waiting',
  currentMultiplier: 1.00,
  lastCrashPoint: null,
  players: [],
  gameHistory: [],
  subscribers: [],
  initialized: false,
  bettingTimer: null,
  gameTimer: null,
  cooldownTimer: null,

  subscribe(callback) {
    this.subscribers.push(callback);
    return () => {
      this.subscribers = this.subscribers.filter(sub => sub !== callback);
    };
  },

  notifySubscribers() {
    this.subscribers.forEach(callback => callback());
  },

  startNewGame() {
    // Clear any existing timers
    if (this.bettingTimer) clearTimeout(this.bettingTimer);
    if (this.gameTimer) clearInterval(this.gameTimer);
    if (this.cooldownTimer) clearTimeout(this.cooldownTimer);

    this.gameState = 'betting';
    this.currentMultiplier = 1.00;
    this.notifySubscribers();

    // Start betting countdown
    let bettingTimeLeft = 10;
    this.bettingTimer = setInterval(() => {
      bettingTimeLeft--;
      this.notifySubscribers();

      if (bettingTimeLeft <= 0) {
        clearInterval(this.bettingTimer);
        this.startGameRound();
      }
    }, 1000);
  },

  startGameRound() {
    this.gameState = 'running';
    this.lastCrashPoint = this.generateCrashPoint();
    this.notifySubscribers();

    // Game runs for up to 30 seconds
    const startTime = Date.now();
    const duration = 30000;

    this.gameTimer = setInterval(() => {
      const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
      const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
      const easedProgress = progress < 0.5 ? 2 * progress * progress : -1 + (4 - 2 * progress) * progress;
      this.currentMultiplier = 1 + (this.lastCrashPoint - 1) * easedProgress;

      // Round the multiplier to 2 decimal places
      this.currentMultiplier = Math.round(this.currentMultiplier * 100) / 100;

      // Check if game should crash
      if (progress >= 1 || this.currentMultiplier >= this.lastCrashPoint) {
        clearInterval(this.gameTimer);
        this.gameState = 'crashed';
        this.gameHistory.unshift({
          crashPoint: this.lastCrashPoint,
          timestamp: new Date(),
          players: this.players.length
        });
        this.gameHistory = this.gameHistory.slice(0, 10); // Keep last 10 games

        // Clear players who didn't cash out
        this.players = this.players.filter(p => p.cashedOut);

        this.notifySubscribers();

        // Start cooldown before next game
        this.cooldownTimer = setTimeout(() => {
          this.startNewGame();
        }, 5000);
      } else {
        this.notifySubscribers();
      }
    }, 100);
  },

  generateCrashPoint() {
    const randomValue = Math.random();
    if (randomValue < 0.5) {
      return parseFloat((1 + Math.random() * 1).toFixed(2));
    } else if (randomValue < 0.75) {
      return parseFloat((2 + Math.random() * 8).toFixed(2));
    } else if (randomValue < 0.9) {
      return parseFloat((10 + Math.random() * 40).toFixed(2));
    } else {
      return parseFloat((50 + Math.random() * 50).toFixed(2));
    }
  }
};

export default function CrashGame() {
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(1000);
  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState('');
  const [autoCashout, setAutoCashout] = useState(null);
  const [playerBets, setPlayerBets] = useState([]);
  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState('waiting');
  const [multiplier, setMultiplier] = useState(1.00);
  const [lastCrash, setLastCrash] = useState(null);
  const [gameHistory, setGameHistory] = useState([]);
  const [players, setPlayers] = useState([]);
  const [bettingTimeLeft, setBettingTimeLeft] = useState(10);
  const router = useRouter();

  // Initialize game service on client side only
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!CrashGameService.initialized && typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      CrashGameService.initialized = true;
      CrashGameService.startNewGame();
    }

    const unsubscribe = CrashGameService.subscribe(() => {
      setGameState(CrashGameService.gameState);
      setMultiplier(CrashGameService.currentMultiplier);
      setLastCrash(CrashGameService.lastCrashPoint);
      setGameHistory([...CrashGameService.gameHistory]);
      setPlayers([...CrashGameService.players]);

      // Update betting timer display
      if (CrashGameService.gameState === 'betting') {
        const startTime = Date.now() - (10000 - bettingTimeLeft * 1000);
        const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
        const timeLeft = Math.max(0, Math.ceil((10000 - elapsed) / 1000));
        setBettingTimeLeft(timeLeft);
      }
    });

    return unsubscribe;
  }, [bettingTimeLeft]);

  const placeBet = () => {
    const amount = parseFloat(betAmount);
    if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) {
      alert('Please enter a valid bet amount');
      return;
    }

    if (amount > balance) {
      alert('Insufficient balance');
      return;
    }

    if (gameState !== 'betting') {
      alert(`You can only bet during the betting period. Current state: ${gameState}`);
      return;
    }

    const newBet = {
      id: Date.now(),
      playerId: 'player-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
      amount,
      cashoutAt: autoCashout || null,
      cashedOut: false,
      cashoutMultiplier: null,
      timestamp: new Date()
    };

    // Add to game service
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      CrashGameService.players.push(newBet);
      CrashGameService.notifySubscribers();
    }

    // Update local state
    setPlayerBets([...playerBets, newBet]);
    setBalance(balance - amount);
    setBetAmount('');
  };

  const cashout = (betId) => {
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      const bet = CrashGameService.players.find(b => b.id === betId && !b.cashedOut);
      if (bet) {
        bet.cashedOut = true;
        bet.cashoutMultiplier = multiplier;
        setBalance(prev => prev + (bet.amount * multiplier));
        CrashGameService.notifySubscribers();
      }
    }
  };

  const cashoutAll = () => {
    playerBets.forEach(bet => {
      if (!bet.cashedOut) {
        cashout(bet.id);
      }
    });
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 text-white p-4">
      <button
        onClick={() => router.back()}
        className="mb-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"
      >
        ← Back to Games
      </button>

      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-yellow-400">CRASH</h1>
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2">
            <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">Balance:</span>
            <span className="text-white font-bold ml-2">${balance.toFixed(2)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-6xl font-bold mb-4" style={{
              color: gameState === 'crashed' ? '#ef4444' :
                     gameState === 'running' ? '#10b981' :
                     gameState === 'betting' ? '#fbbf24' : '#6b7280'
            }}>
              {gameState === 'waiting' ? '--.--' : multiplier.toFixed(2)}x
            </div>

            <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4">
              {gameState === 'waiting' && 'Waiting for next round...'}
              {gameState === 'betting' && `Betting period (${bettingTimeLeft}s left)`}
              {gameState === 'running' && 'Game in progress...'}
              {gameState === 'crashed' && `Game crashed at ${lastCrash}x`}
            </div>

            {gameState === 'betting' && (
              <div className="flex justify-center gap-4 mb-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={betAmount}
                    onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="Amount"
                    min="1"
                    max={balance}
                    className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 w-32"
                  />
                  <button
                    onClick={placeBet}
                    className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded transition-colors"
                  >
                    Place Bet
                  </button>
                </div>

                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={autoCashout || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => setAutoCashout(parseFloat(e.target.value) || null)}
                    placeholder="Auto"
                    min="1.00"
                    max="100.00"
                    step="0.01"
                    className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 w-20"
                  />
                  <span className="text-gray-400">x</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {gameState === 'running' && playerBets.length > 0 && (
              <button
                onClick={cashoutAll}
                className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-lg text-lg transition-colors"
              >
                CASH OUT ALL
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-6">
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Your Bets ({playerBets.length})</h3>
            {playerBets.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No active bets</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {playerBets.map((bet) => (
                  <div key={bet.id} className={`flex justify-between items-center rounded p-2 ${
                    bet.cashedOut ? 'bg-green-900/50' : 'bg-gray-700'
                  }`}>
                    <div>
                      <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">You</span>
                      <span className="text-gray-300 ml-2">${bet.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
                      {bet.cashoutAt && <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">(Auto: {bet.cashoutAt}x)</span>}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      {bet.cashedOut ? (
                        <>
                          <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                            Cashed out at {bet.cashoutMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">
                            +${(bet.amount * bet.cashoutMultiplier).toFixed(2)}
                          </span>
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        gameState === 'running' && (
                          <button
                            onClick={() => cashout(bet.id)}
                            className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded transition-colors"
                          >
                            Cash Out
                          </button>
                        )
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">All Players ({players.length})</h3>
            {players.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No active players</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto">
                {players.map((player) => (
                  <div key={player.id} className={`flex justify-between items-center rounded p-2 ${
                    player.cashedOut ? 'bg-green-900/50' : 'bg-gray-700'
                  }`}>
                    <div>
                      <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">{player.playerId.substring(0, 6)}...</span>
                      <span className="text-gray-300 ml-2">${player.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
                      {player.cashoutAt && <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">(Auto: {player.cashoutAt}x)</span>}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      {player.cashedOut ? (
                        <>
                          <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                            Cashed out at {player.cashoutMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">
                            +${(player.amount * player.cashoutMultiplier).toFixed(2)}
                          </span>
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        gameState === 'crashed' && (
                          <span className="text-red-400 text-sm">Lost</span>
                        )
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
          <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Game History</h3>
          {gameHistory.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No game history</p>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {gameHistory.map((game, index) => (
                <div key={index} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-700 rounded p-2">
                  <div>
                    <span className="text-gray-300">Game #{index + 1}</span>
                    <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">({game.players} players)</span>
                  </div>
                  <span className={`font-bold ${
                    parseFloat(game.crashPoint) < 2 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-green-400'
                  }`}>
                    {game.crashPoint}x
                  </span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

pages/games/crash.js
```
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';

// Mock backend service for shared game state
const CrashGameService = {
  // In a real app, this would connect to a WebSocket or API
  gameState: 'waiting',
  currentMultiplier: 1.00,
  lastCrashPoint: null,
  players: [],
  gameHistory: [],
  subscribers: [],
  initialized: false,
  bettingTimer: null,
  gameTimer: null,
  cooldownTimer: null,

  subscribe(callback) {
    this.subscribers.push(callback);
    return () => {
      this.subscribers = this.subscribers.filter(sub => sub !== callback);
    };
  },

  notifySubscribers() {
    this.subscribers.forEach(callback => callback());
  },

  startNewGame() {
    // Clear any existing timers
    if (this.bettingTimer) clearTimeout(this.bettingTimer);
    if (this.gameTimer) clearInterval(this.gameTimer);
    if (this.cooldownTimer) clearTimeout(this.cooldownTimer);

    this.gameState = 'betting';
    this.currentMultiplier = 1.00;
    this.notifySubscribers();

    // Start betting countdown
    let bettingTimeLeft = 10;
    this.bettingTimer = setInterval(() => {
      bettingTimeLeft--;
      this.notifySubscribers();

      if (bettingTimeLeft <= 0) {
        clearInterval(this.bettingTimer);
        this.startGameRound();
      }
    }, 1000);
  },

  startGameRound() {
    this.gameState = 'running';
    this.lastCrashPoint = this.generateCrashPoint();
    this.notifySubscribers();

    // Game runs for up to 30 seconds
    const startTime = Date.now();
    const duration = 30000;

    this.gameTimer = setInterval(() => {
      const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
      const progress = Math.min(elapsed / duration, 1);
      const easedProgress = progress < 0.5 ? 2 * progress * progress : -1 + (4 - 2 * progress) * progress;
      this.currentMultiplier = 1 + (this.lastCrashPoint - 1) * easedProgress;

      // Round the multiplier to 2 decimal places
      this.currentMultiplier = Math.round(this.currentMultiplier * 100) / 100;

      // Check if game should crash
      if (progress >= 1 || this.currentMultiplier >= this.lastCrashPoint) {
        clearInterval(this.gameTimer);
        this.gameState = 'crashed';
        this.gameHistory.unshift({
          crashPoint: this.lastCrashPoint,
          timestamp: new Date(),
          players: this.players.length
        });
        this.gameHistory = this.gameHistory.slice(0, 10); // Keep last 10 games

        // Clear players who didn't cash out
        this.players = this.players.filter(p => p.cashedOut);

        this.notifySubscribers();

        // Start cooldown before next game
        this.cooldownTimer = setTimeout(() => {
          this.startNewGame();
        }, 5000);
      } else {
        this.notifySubscribers();
      }
    }, 100);
  },

  generateCrashPoint() {
    const randomValue = Math.random();
    if (randomValue < 0.5) {
      return parseFloat((1 + Math.random() * 1).toFixed(2));
    } else if (randomValue < 0.75) {
      return parseFloat((2 + Math.random() * 8).toFixed(2));
    } else if (randomValue < 0.9) {
      return parseFloat((10 + Math.random() * 40).toFixed(2));
    } else {
      return parseFloat((50 + Math.random() * 50).toFixed(2));
    }
  }
};

export default function CrashGame() {
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(1000);
  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState('');
  const [autoCashout, setAutoCashout] = useState(null);
  const [playerBets, setPlayerBets] = useState([]);
  const [gameState, setGameState] = useState('waiting');
  const [multiplier, setMultiplier] = useState(1.00);
  const [lastCrash, setLastCrash] = useState(null);
  const [gameHistory, setGameHistory] = useState([]);
  const [players, setPlayers] = useState([]);
  const [bettingTimeLeft, setBettingTimeLeft] = useState(10);
  const router = useRouter();

  // Initialize game service on client side only
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!CrashGameService.initialized && typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      CrashGameService.initialized = true;
      CrashGameService.startNewGame();
    }

    const unsubscribe = CrashGameService.subscribe(() => {
      setGameState(CrashGameService.gameState);
      setMultiplier(CrashGameService.currentMultiplier);
      setLastCrash(CrashGameService.lastCrashPoint);
      setGameHistory([...CrashGameService.gameHistory]);
      setPlayers([...CrashGameService.players]);

      // Update betting timer display
      if (CrashGameService.gameState === 'betting') {
        const startTime = Date.now() - (10000 - bettingTimeLeft * 1000);
        const elapsed = Date.now() - startTime;
        const timeLeft = Math.max(0, Math.ceil((10000 - elapsed) / 1000));
        setBettingTimeLeft(timeLeft);
      }
    });

    return unsubscribe;
  }, [bettingTimeLeft]);

  const placeBet = () => {
    const amount = parseFloat(betAmount);
    if (isNaN(amount) || amount <= 0) {
      alert('Please enter a valid bet amount');
      return;
    }

    if (amount > balance) {
      alert('Insufficient balance');
      return;
    }

    if (gameState !== 'betting') {
      alert(`You can only bet during the betting period. Current state: ${gameState}`);
      return;
    }

    const newBet = {
      id: Date.now(),
      playerId: 'player-' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
      amount,
      cashoutAt: autoCashout || null,
      cashedOut: false,
      cashoutMultiplier: null,
      timestamp: new Date()
    };

    // Add to game service
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      CrashGameService.players.push(newBet);
      CrashGameService.notifySubscribers();
    }

    // Update local state
    setPlayerBets([...playerBets, newBet]);
    setBalance(balance - amount);
    setBetAmount('');
  };

  const cashout = (betId) => {
    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
      const bet = CrashGameService.players.find(b => b.id === betId && !b.cashedOut);
      if (bet) {
        bet.cashedOut = true;
        bet.cashoutMultiplier = multiplier;
        setBalance(prev => prev + (bet.amount * multiplier));
        CrashGameService.notifySubscribers();
      }
    }
  };

  const cashoutAll = () => {
    playerBets.forEach(bet => {
      if (!bet.cashedOut) {
        cashout(bet.id);
      }
    });
  };

  // Filter out cashed out bets from playerBets
  const activePlayerBets = playerBets.filter(bet => !bet.cashedOut);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 text-white p-4">
      <button
        onClick={() => router.back()}
        className="mb-4 text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"
      >
        ← Back to Games
      </button>

      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-4">
          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-yellow-400">CRASH</h1>
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg px-4 py-2">
            <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">Balance:</span>
            <span className="text-white font-bold ml-2">${balance.toFixed(2)}</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <div className="text-center">
            <div className="text-6xl font-bold mb-4" style={{
              color: gameState === 'crashed' ? '#ef4444' :
                     gameState === 'running' ? '#10b981' :
                     gameState === 'betting' ? '#fbbf24' : '#6b7280'
            }}>
              {gameState === 'waiting' ? '--.--' : multiplier.toFixed(2)}x
            </div>

            <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-4">
              {gameState === 'waiting' && 'Waiting for next round...'}
              {gameState === 'betting' && `Betting period (${bettingTimeLeft}s left)`}
              {gameState === 'running' && 'Game in progress...'}
              {gameState === 'crashed' && `Game crashed at ${lastCrash}x`}
            </div>

            {gameState === 'betting' && (
              <div className="flex justify-center gap-4 mb-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={betAmount}
                    onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(e.target.value)}
                    placeholder="Amount"
                    min="1"
                    max={balance}
                    className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 w-32"
                  />
                  <button
                    onClick={placeBet}
                    className="bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded transition-colors"
                  >
                    Place Bet
                  </button>
                </div>

                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={autoCashout || ''}
                    onChange={(e) => setAutoCashout(parseFloat(e.target.value) || null)}
                    placeholder="Auto"
                    min="1.00"
                    max="100.00"
                    step="0.01"
                    className="bg-gray-700 text-white rounded px-3 py-2 w-20"
                  />
                  <span className="text-gray-400">x</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            {gameState === 'running' && activePlayerBets.length > 0 && (
              <button
                onClick={cashoutAll}
                className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-lg text-lg transition-colors"
              >
                CASH OUT ALL
              </button>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-6">
          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Your Bets ({playerBets.length})</h3>
            {playerBets.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No active bets</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2">
                {playerBets.map((bet) => (
                  <div key={bet.id} className={`flex justify-between items-center rounded p-2 ${
                    bet.cashedOut ? 'bg-green-900/50' : 'bg-gray-700'
                  }`}>
                    <div>
                      <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">You</span>
                      <span className="text-gray-300 ml-2">${bet.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
                      {bet.cashoutAt && <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">(Auto: {bet.cashoutAt}x)</span>}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      {bet.cashedOut ? (
                        <>
                          <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                            Cashed out at {bet.cashoutMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">
                            +${(bet.amount * bet.cashoutMultiplier).toFixed(2)}
                          </span>
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        gameState === 'running' && (
                          <button
                            onClick={() => cashout(bet.id)}
                            className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded transition-colors"
                          >
                            Cash Out
                          </button>
                        )
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">All Players ({players.length})</h3>
            {players.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No active players</p>
            ) : (
              <div className="space-y-2 max-h-64 overflow-y-auto">
                {players.map((player) => (
                  <div key={player.id} className={`flex justify-between items-center rounded p-2 ${
                    player.cashedOut ? 'bg-green-900/50' : 'bg-gray-700'
                  }`}>
                    <div>
                      <span className="text-yellow-400 font-bold">{player.playerId.substring(0, 6)}...</span>
                      <span className="text-gray-300 ml-2">${player.amount.toFixed(2)}</span>
                      {player.cashoutAt && <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">(Auto: {player.cashoutAt}x)</span>}
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      {player.cashedOut ? (
                        <>
                          <span className="text-green-400 text-sm">
                            Cashed out at {player.cashoutMultiplier.toFixed(2)}x
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-green-400 font-bold">
                            +${(player.amount * player.cashoutMultiplier).toFixed(2)}
                          </span>
                        </>
                      ) : (
                        gameState === 'crashed' && (
                          <span className="text-red-400 text-sm">Lost</span>
                        )
                      )}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-4">
          <h3 className="text-yellow-400 font-bold mb-4">Game History</h3>
          {gameHistory.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-gray-400 text-center">No game history</p>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-2">
              {gameHistory.map((game, index) => (
                <div key={index} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-700 rounded p-2">
                  <div>
                    <span className="text-gray-300">Game #{index + 1}</span>
                    <span className="text-blue-400 ml-2">({game.players} players)</span>
                  </div>
                  <span className={`font-bold ${
                    parseFloat(game.crashPoint) < 2 ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-green-400'
                  }`}>
                    {game.crashPoint}x
                  </span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

I've made the following changes to make the cash out button disappear when there are no active bets left:

1. Added a new variable `activePlayerBets` that filters out cashed out bets:
```javascript
const activePlayerBets = playerBets.filter(bet => !bet.cashedOut);
```

2. Updated the condition for showing the "CASH OUT ALL" button to check `activePlayerBets.length > 0` instead of `playerBets.length > 0`:
```javascript
{gameState === 'running' && activePlayerBets.length > 0 && (
  <button
    onClick={cashoutAll}
    className="bg-red-500 hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-bold py-3 px-8 rounded-lg text-lg transition-colors"
  >
    CASH OUT ALL
  </button>
)}
```

Now the cash out button will only be visible when there are active (non-cashed out) bets during the running game state. Once all bets are cashed out or the game crashes, the button will disappear.
