Understood. Here's the complete Dice game implementation in the required format:

pages/games/dice.js
```
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';

export default function DiceGame() {
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(0);
  const [user, setUser] = useState(null);
  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState('');
  const [target, setTarget] = useState(50);
  const [roll, setRoll] = useState(null);
  const [gameHistory, setGameHistory] = useState([]);
  const [autoBet, setAutoBet] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetCount, setAutoBetCount] = useState(0);
  const [autoBetTarget, setAutoBetTarget] = useState(50);
  const [autoBetAmount, setAutoBetAmount] = useState('');
  const [autoBetMaxLoss, setAutoBetMaxLoss] = useState('');
  const [autoBetMaxProfit, setAutoBetMaxProfit] = useState('');
  const [autoBetRuns, setAutoBetRuns] = useState(0);
  const [autoBetMaxRuns, setAutoBetMaxRuns] = useState(10);
  const [autoBetOnWin, setAutoBetOnWin] = useState('reset');
  const [autoBetOnLoss, setAutoBetOnLoss] = useState('increase');
  const [autoBetStopOnProfit, setAutoBetStopOnProfit] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnLoss, setAutoBetStopOnLoss] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnRuns, setAutoBetStopOnRuns] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnTarget, setAutoBetStopOnTarget] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnRoll, setAutoBetStopOnRoll] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnRollValue, setAutoBetStopOnRollValue] = useState(50);
  const [autoBetStopOnRollDirection, setAutoBetStopOnRollDirection] = useState('under');
  const router = useRouter();

  useEffect(() => {
    const storedUser = localStorage.getItem('user');
    if (storedUser) {
      const userData = JSON.parse(storedUser);
      setUser(userData);
      fetchBalance(userData.name);
    } else {
      router.push('/auth/login');
    }
  }, [router]);

  const fetchBalance = async (userId) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetch(`/api/balance?userId=${userId}`);
      const data = await response.json();
      setBalance(data.balance);
      localStorage.setItem('balance', data.balance.toString());
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching balance:', error);
    }
  };

  const updateBalance = async (newBalance) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/balance', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          userId: user.name,
          amount: newBalance - parseFloat(localStorage.getItem('balance') || '0')
        }),
      });
      const data = await response.json();
      setBalance(data.balance);
      localStorage.setItem('balance', data.balance.toString());
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error updating balance:', error);
    }
  };

  const rollDice = async () => {
    if (!betAmount || parseFloat(betAmount) <= 0) {
      alert('Please enter a valid bet amount');
      return;
    }

    if (parseFloat(betAmount) > balance) {
      alert('Insufficient balance');
      return;
    }

    const amount = parseFloat(betAmount);
    const newBalance = balance - amount;
    await updateBalance(newBalance);

    // Generate random roll between 1-100
    const randomRoll = Math.floor(Math.random() * 100) + 1;
    setRoll(randomRoll);

    // Determine win/loss
    const isWin = target >= 50 ? randomRoll >= target : randomRoll <= target;
    const multiplier = isWin ? (99 / (target >= 50 ? 100 - target : target)) : 0;
    const winAmount = isWin ? amount * multiplier : 0;

    // Update balance if win
    if (isWin) {
      const finalBalance = newBalance + winAmount;
      await updateBalance(finalBalance);
    }

    // Add to game history
    setGameHistory(prev => [{
      roll: randomRoll,
      target,
      bet: amount,
      win: winAmount,
      isWin,
      timestamp: new Date()
    }, ...prev].slice(0, 10));
  };

  const toggleAutoBet = () => {
    if (autoBet) {
      setAutoBet(false);
      setAutoBetCount(0);
      setAutoBetRuns(0);
    } else {
      if (!autoBetAmount || parseFloat(autoBetAmount) <= 0) {
        alert('Please set a valid auto bet amount');
        return;
      }
      setAutoBet(true);
      setAutoBetCount(0);
      setAutoBetRuns(0);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    let interval;
    if (autoBet && autoBetCount < autoBetMaxRuns) {
      interval = setInterval(() => {
        const amount = parseFloat(autoBetAmount);
        if (amount > balance) {
          setAutoBet(false);
          return;
        }

        const newBalance = balance - amount;
        updateBalance(newBalance);

        const randomRoll = Math.floor(Math.random() * 100) + 1;
        setRoll(randomRoll);

        const isWin = autoBetTarget >= 50 ? randomRoll >= autoBetTarget : randomRoll <= autoBetTarget;
        const multiplier = isWin ? (99 / (autoBetTarget >= 50 ? 100 - autoBetTarget : autoBetTarget)) : 0;
        const winAmount = isWin ? amount * multiplier : 0;

        if (isWin) {
          const finalBalance = newBalance + winAmount;
          updateBalance(finalBalance);
        }

        setGameHistory(prev => [{
          roll: randomRoll,
          target: autoBetTarget,
          bet: amount,
          win: winAmount,
          isWin,
          timestamp: new Date()
        }, ...prev].slice(0, 10));

        setAutoBetCount(prev => prev + 1);
        setAutoBetRuns(prev => prev + 1);
      }, 3000);
    }
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [autoBet, autoBetCount, autoBetMaxRuns, balance, autoBetAmount, autoBetTarget]);

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 text-white p-4">
      <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
          <button
            onClick={() => router.back()}
            className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"
          >
            ← Back to Games
          </button>
          <div className="bg-purple-600 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg">
            Balance: {balance.toFixed(2)} ✧
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-6 text-center">Dice Game</h1>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-6">
            <div className="bg-gray-700 rounded-lg p-4">
              <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Manual Bet</h2>
              <div className="space-y-4">
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm mb-1">Bet Amount</label>
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={betAmount}
                    onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(e.target.value)}
                    className="w-full bg-gray-600 rounded px-3 py-2 text-white"
                    min="0"
                    step="0.01"
                  />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm mb-1">Target (1-100)</label>
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={target}
                    onChange={(e) => {
                      let val = parseInt(e.target.value);
                      if (isNaN(val)) val = 50;
                      if (val < 1) val = 1;
                      if (val > 100) val = 100;
                      setTarget(val);
                    }}
                    className="w-full bg-gray-600 rounded px-3 py-2 text-white"
                    min="1"
                    max="100"
                  />
                  <div className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-1">
                    {target >= 50 ? 'Rolling OVER' : 'Rolling UNDER'} {target} - Payout: {(99 / (target >= 50 ? 100 - target : target)).toFixed(2)}x
                  </div>
                </div>
                <button
                  onClick={rollDice}
                  disabled={!betAmount || parseFloat(betAmount) <= 0 || parseFloat(betAmount) > balance}
                  className="w-full bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 py-2 rounded-lg font-semibold transition disabled:opacity-50"
                >
                  Roll Dice
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="bg-gray-700 rounded-lg p-4">
              <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Auto Bet</h2>
              <div className="space-y-4">
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm mb-1">Auto Bet Amount</label>
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={autoBetAmount}
                    onChange={(e) => setAutoBetAmount(e.target.value)}
                    className="w-full bg-gray-600 rounded px-3 py-2 text-white"
                    min="0"
                    step="0.01"
                  />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm mb-1">Auto Bet Target</label>
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={autoBetTarget}
                    onChange={(e) => {
                      let val = parseInt(e.target.value);
                      if (isNaN(val)) val = 50;
                      if (val < 1) val = 1;
                      if (val > 100) val = 100;
                      setAutoBetTarget(val);
                    }}
                    className="w-full bg-gray-600 rounded px-3 py-2 text-white"
                    min="1"
                    max="100"
                  />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm mb-1">Max Runs</label>
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={autoBetMaxRuns}
                    onChange={(e) => setAutoBetMaxRuns(parseInt(e.target.value) || 0)}
                    className="w-full bg-gray-600 rounded px-3 py-2 text-white"
                    min="0"
                  />
                </div>
                <button
                  onClick={toggleAutoBet}
                  className={`w-full ${autoBet ? 'bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700' : 'bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700'} py-2 rounded-lg font-semibold transition`}
                >
                  {autoBet ? 'Stop Auto Bet' : 'Start Auto Bet'}
                </button>
                {autoBet && (
                  <div className="text-sm text-gray-300">
                    Runs: {autoBetRuns}/{autoBetMaxRuns}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-700 rounded-lg p-4 mb-6">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Current Roll</h2>
            <div className="flex justify-center items-center h-32">
              {roll === null ? (
                <div className="text-gray-400">No roll yet</div>
              ) : (
                <div className="text-6xl font-bold">
                  {roll}
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-700 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Game History</h2>
            <div className="space-y-2 max-h-60 overflow-y-auto">
              {gameHistory.length === 0 ? (
                <p className="text-gray-400">No game history yet</p>
              ) : (
                gameHistory.map((game, index) => (
                  <div key={index} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-600 rounded p-2">
                    <div className="flex items-center space-x-3">
                      <div className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center ${game.isWin ? 'bg-green-600' : 'bg-red-600'}`}>
                        {game.roll}
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <div className="text-sm">
                          {game.isWin ? 'Win' : 'Loss'} - {game.target >= 50 ? 'Over' : 'Under'} {game.target}
                        </div>
                        <div className="text-xs text-gray-400">
                          {game.bet.toFixed(2)} ✧ → {game.win > 0 ? `+${game.win.toFixed(2)}` : '-'} ✧
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className={`font-semibold ${game.isWin ? 'text-green-400' : 'text-red-400'}`}>
                      {game.isWin ? `+${game.win.toFixed(2)}` : `-${game.bet.toFixed(2)}`} ✧
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

This Dice game implementation includes:

1. Manual betting with configurable target (1-100)
2. Auto-betting functionality with configurable parameters
3. Game history tracking
4. Visual roll display
5. Win/loss calculation based on target
6. Proper balance management
7. Responsive design matching the casino theme

The game follows the same pattern as the other games in your casino, with proper balance updates and user authentication. The dice mechanics are similar to Stake's implementation where users can bet on whether the roll will be over or under their chosen target.

pages/games/dice.js
```
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';

export default function DiceGame() {
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(0);
  const [user, setUser] = useState(null);
  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState('');
  const [target, setTarget] = useState(50);
  const [roll, setRoll] = useState(null);
  const [gameHistory, setGameHistory] = useState([]);
  const [autoBet, setAutoBet] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetCount, setAutoBetCount] = useState(0);
  const [autoBetTarget, setAutoBetTarget] = useState(50);
  const [autoBetAmount, setAutoBetAmount] = useState('');
  const [autoBetMaxLoss, setAutoBetMaxLoss] = useState('');
  const [autoBetMaxProfit, setAutoBetMaxProfit] = useState('');
  const [autoBetRuns, setAutoBetRuns] = useState(0);
  const [autoBetMaxRuns, setAutoBetMaxRuns] = useState(10);
  const [autoBetOnWin, setAutoBetOnWin] = useState('reset');
  const [autoBetOnLoss, setAutoBetOnLoss] = useState('increase');
  const [autoBetStopOnProfit, setAutoBetStopOnProfit] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnLoss, setAutoBetStopOnLoss] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnRuns, setAutoBetStopOnRuns] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnTarget, setAutoBetStopOnTarget] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnRoll, setAutoBetStopOnRoll] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnRollValue, setAutoBetStopOnRollValue] = useState(50);
  const [autoBetStopOnRollDirection, setAutoBetStopOnRollDirection] = useState('under');
  const [rolling, setRolling] = useState(false);
  const router = useRouter();

  useEffect(() => {
    const storedUser = localStorage.getItem('user');
    if (storedUser) {
      const userData = JSON.parse(storedUser);
      setUser(userData);
      fetchBalance(userData.name);
    } else {
      router.push('/auth/login');
    }
  }, [router]);

  const fetchBalance = async (userId) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetch(`/api/balance?userId=${userId}`);
      const data = await response.json();
      setBalance(data.balance);
      localStorage.setItem('balance', data.balance.toString());
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching balance:', error);
    }
  };

  const updateBalance = async (newBalance) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/balance', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          userId: user.name,
          amount: newBalance - parseFloat(localStorage.getItem('balance') || '0')
        }),
      });
      const data = await response.json();
      setBalance(data.balance);
      localStorage.setItem('balance', data.balance.toString());
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error updating balance:', error);
    }
  };

  const rollDice = async () => {
    if (!betAmount || parseFloat(betAmount) <= 0) {
      alert('Please enter a valid bet amount');
      return;
    }

    if (parseFloat(betAmount) > balance) {
      alert('Insufficient balance');
      return;
    }

    const amount = parseFloat(betAmount);
    const newBalance = balance - amount;
    await updateBalance(newBalance);

    // Start rolling animation
    setRolling(true);

    // Simulate rolling animation with multiple random numbers
    const rollSequence = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < 15; i++) {
      rollSequence.push(Math.floor(Math.random() * 100) + 1);
    }

    // Animate the rolling
    for (let i = 0; i < rollSequence.length; i++) {
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, i === rollSequence.length - 1 ? 200 : 50));
      setRoll(rollSequence[i]);
    }

    // Final roll
    const randomRoll = Math.floor(Math.random() * 100) + 1;
    setRoll(randomRoll);
    setRolling(false);

    // Determine win/loss
    const isWin = target >= 50 ? randomRoll >= target : randomRoll <= target;
    const multiplier = isWin ? (99 / (target >= 50 ? 100 - target : target)) : 0;
    const winAmount = isWin ? amount * multiplier : 0;

    // Update balance if win
    if (isWin) {
      const finalBalance = newBalance + winAmount;
      await updateBalance(finalBalance);
    }

    // Add to game history
    setGameHistory(prev => [{
      roll: randomRoll,
      target,
      bet: amount,
      win: winAmount,
      isWin,
      timestamp: new Date()
    }, ...prev].slice(0, 10));
  };

  const toggleAutoBet = () => {
    if (autoBet) {
      setAutoBet(false);
      setAutoBetCount(0);
      setAutoBetRuns(0);
    } else {
      if (!autoBetAmount || parseFloat(autoBetAmount) <= 0) {
        alert('Please set a valid auto bet amount');
        return;
      }
      setAutoBet(true);
      setAutoBetCount(0);
      setAutoBetRuns(0);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    let interval;
    if (autoBet && autoBetCount < autoBetMaxRuns) {
      interval = setInterval(() => {
        const amount = parseFloat(autoBetAmount);
        if (amount > balance) {
          setAutoBet(false);
          return;
        }

        const newBalance = balance - amount;
        updateBalance(newBalance);

        // Start rolling animation
        setRolling(true);

        // Simulate rolling animation
        const rollSequence = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
          rollSequence.push(Math.floor(Math.random() * 100) + 1);
        }

        // Animate the rolling
        let currentStep = 0;
        const rollInterval = setInterval(() => {
          if (currentStep < rollSequence.length) {
            setRoll(rollSequence[currentStep]);
            currentStep++;
          } else {
            clearInterval(rollInterval);
            const randomRoll = Math.floor(Math.random() * 100) + 1;
            setRoll(randomRoll);
            setRolling(false);

            const isWin = autoBetTarget >= 50 ? randomRoll >= autoBetTarget : randomRoll <= autoBetTarget;
            const multiplier = isWin ? (99 / (autoBetTarget >= 50 ? 100 - autoBetTarget : autoBetTarget)) : 0;
            const winAmount = isWin ? amount * multiplier : 0;

            if (isWin) {
              const finalBalance = newBalance + winAmount;
              updateBalance(finalBalance);
            }

            setGameHistory(prev => [{
              roll: randomRoll,
              target: autoBetTarget,
              bet: amount,
              win: winAmount,
              isWin,
              timestamp: new Date()
            }, ...prev].slice(0, 10));

            setAutoBetCount(prev => prev + 1);
            setAutoBetRuns(prev => prev + 1);
          }
        }, 50);
      }, 3000);
    }
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [autoBet, autoBetCount, autoBetMaxRuns, balance, autoBetAmount, autoBetTarget]);

  // Get dice face based on roll value
  const getDiceFace = (value) => {
    // Simple dice representation - we'll use the actual number but with a dice-like styling
    return (
      <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-white rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-black text-2xl font-bold shadow-lg">
        {value}
      </div>
    );
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 text-white p-4">
      <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
          <button
            onClick={() => router.back()}
            className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"
          >
            ← Back to Games
          </button>
          <div className="bg-purple-600 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg">
            Balance: {balance.toFixed(2)} ✧
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-6 text-center">Dice Game</h1>

          {/* Dice Roll Display at the Top */}
          <div className="bg-gray-700 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
            <div className="flex flex-col items-center">
              <div className="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">
                {target >= 50 ? 'Rolling OVER' : 'Rolling UNDER'} {target}
                <span className="ml-2 text-purple-400">
                  Payout: {(99 / (target >= 50 ? 100 - target : target)).toFixed(2)}x
                </span>
              </div>

              <div className="flex items-center space-x-8 mb-4">
                <div className="text-center">
                  <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Your Target</div>
                  <div className="text-2xl font-bold">{target}</div>
                </div>

                <div className="text-center">
                  <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Roll Result</div>
                  <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                    {rolling ? (
                      <div className="text-2xl">🎲</div>
                    ) : roll === null ? (
                      <div className="text-gray-500">-</div>
                    ) : (
                      getDiceFace(roll)
                    )}
                    {roll && !rolling && (
                      <div className={`text-2xl font-bold ${roll >= target ? 'text-green-400' : 'text-red-400'}`}>
                        {roll >= target ? '↑' : '↓'}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Target Slider */}
              <div className="w-full max-w-md">
                <input
                  type="range"
                  min="1"
                  max="99"
                  value={target}
                  onChange={(e) => {
                    let val = parseInt(e.target.value);
                    if (isNaN(val)) val = 50;
                    if (val < 1) val = 1;
                    if (val > 99) val = 99;
                    setTarget(val);
                  }}
                  className="w-full h-2 bg-gray-600 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer"
                />
                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-gray-400 mt-1">
                  <span>1</span>
                  <span>50</span>
                  <span>99</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-6">
            <div className="bg-gray-700 rounded-lg p-4">
              <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Manual Bet</h2>
              <div className="space-y-4">
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm mb-1">Bet Amount</label>
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={betAmount}
                    onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(e.target.value)}
                    className="w-full bg-gray-600 rounded px-3 py-2 text-white"
                    min="0"
                    step="0.01"
                  />
                </div>
                <button
                  onClick={rollDice}
                  disabled={!betAmount || parseFloat(betAmount) <= 0 || parseFloat(betAmount) > balance || rolling}
                  className="w-full bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 py-2 rounded-lg font-semibold transition disabled:opacity-50"
                >
                  {rolling ? 'Rolling...' : 'Roll Dice'}
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="bg-gray-700 rounded-lg p-4">
              <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Auto Bet</h2>
              <div className="space-y-4">
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm mb-1">Auto Bet Amount</label>
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={autoBetAmount}
                    onChange={(e) => setAutoBetAmount(e.target.value)}
                    className="w-full bg-gray-600 rounded px-3 py-2 text-white"
                    min="0"
                    step="0.01"
                  />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm mb-1">Auto Bet Target</label>
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={autoBetTarget}
                    onChange={(e) => {
                      let val = parseInt(e.target.value);
                      if (isNaN(val)) val = 50;
                      if (val < 1) val = 1;
                      if (val > 100) val = 100;
                      setAutoBetTarget(val);
                    }}
                    className="w-full bg-gray-600 rounded px-3 py-2 text-white"
                    min="1"
                    max="100"
                  />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm mb-1">Max Runs</label>
                  <input
                    type="number"
                    value={autoBetMaxRuns}
                    onChange={(e) => setAutoBetMaxRuns(parseInt(e.target.value) || 0)}
                    className="w-full bg-gray-600 rounded px-3 py-2 text-white"
                    min="0"
                  />
                </div>
                <button
                  onClick={toggleAutoBet}
                  disabled={rolling}
                  className={`w-full ${autoBet ? 'bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700' : 'bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700'} py-2 rounded-lg font-semibold transition disabled:opacity-50`}
                >
                  {autoBet ? 'Stop Auto Bet' : 'Start Auto Bet'}
                </button>
                {autoBet && (
                  <div className="text-sm text-gray-300">
                    Runs: {autoBetRuns}/{autoBetMaxRuns}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div className="bg-gray-700 rounded-lg p-4">
            <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Game History</h2>
            <div className="space-y-2 max-h-60 overflow-y-auto">
              {gameHistory.length === 0 ? (
                <p className="text-gray-400">No game history yet</p>
              ) : (
                gameHistory.map((game, index) => (
                  <div key={index} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-600 rounded p-2">
                    <div className="flex items-center space-x-3">
                      <div className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center ${game.isWin ? 'bg-green-600' : 'bg-red-600'}`}>
                        {game.roll}
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <div className="text-sm">
                          {game.isWin ? 'Win' : 'Loss'} - {game.target >= 50 ? 'Over' : 'Under'} {game.target}
                        </div>
                        <div className="text-xs text-gray-400">
                          {game.bet.toFixed(2)} ✧ → {game.win > 0 ? `+${game.win.toFixed(2)}` : '-'} ✧
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className={`font-semibold ${game.isWin ? 'text-green-400' : 'text-red-400'}`}>
                      {game.isWin ? `+${game.win.toFixed(2)}` : `-${game.bet.toFixed(2)}`} ✧
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ))
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

Key changes made:

1. **Moved the roll display to the top** of the game interface
2. **Added a graphical dice representation** with a white dice face showing the number
3. **Added a slider** for choosing the target value (1-99)
4. **Improved the rolling animation** with multiple random numbers before settling on the final result
5. **Added visual indicators** showing whether the roll was over/under the target
6. **Added a rolling state** to disable buttons during animation
7. **Improved the layout** to make the dice roll more prominent
8. **Added payout information** directly in the dice display area

The dice now has a proper graphical representation and the target selection is more intuitive with the slider. The rolling animation makes the game feel more dynamic and engaging.

Here's the updated Dice game with a better bet history display on the right side:

pages/games/dice.js
```
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useRouter } from 'next/router';

export default function DiceGame() {
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(0);
  const [user, setUser] = useState(null);
  const [betAmount, setBetAmount] = useState('');
  const [target, setTarget] = useState(50);
  const [roll, setRoll] = useState(null);
  const [gameHistory, setGameHistory] = useState([]);
  const [autoBet, setAutoBet] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetCount, setAutoBetCount] = useState(0);
  const [autoBetTarget, setAutoBetTarget] = useState(50);
  const [autoBetAmount, setAutoBetAmount] = useState('');
  const [autoBetMaxLoss, setAutoBetMaxLoss] = useState('');
  const [autoBetMaxProfit, setAutoBetMaxProfit] = useState('');
  const [autoBetRuns, setAutoBetRuns] = useState(0);
  const [autoBetMaxRuns, setAutoBetMaxRuns] = useState(10);
  const [autoBetOnWin, setAutoBetOnWin] = useState('reset');
  const [autoBetOnLoss, setAutoBetOnLoss] = useState('increase');
  const [autoBetStopOnProfit, setAutoBetStopOnProfit] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnLoss, setAutoBetStopOnLoss] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnRuns, setAutoBetStopOnRuns] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnTarget, setAutoBetStopOnTarget] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnRoll, setAutoBetStopOnRoll] = useState(false);
  const [autoBetStopOnRollValue, setAutoBetStopOnRollValue] = useState(50);
  const [autoBetStopOnRollDirection, setAutoBetStopOnRollDirection] = useState('under');
  const [rolling, setRolling] = useState(false);
  const router = useRouter();

  useEffect(() => {
    const storedUser = localStorage.getItem('user');
    if (storedUser) {
      const userData = JSON.parse(storedUser);
      setUser(userData);
      fetchBalance(userData.name);
    } else {
      router.push('/auth/login');
    }
  }, [router]);

  const fetchBalance = async (userId) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetch(`/api/balance?userId=${userId}`);
      const data = await response.json();
      setBalance(data.balance);
      localStorage.setItem('balance', data.balance.toString());
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching balance:', error);
    }
  };

  const updateBalance = async (newBalance) => {
    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/balance', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          userId: user.name,
          amount: newBalance - parseFloat(localStorage.getItem('balance') || '0')
        }),
      });
      const data = await response.json();
      setBalance(data.balance);
      localStorage.setItem('balance', data.balance.toString());
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error updating balance:', error);
    }
  };

  const rollDice = async () => {
    if (!betAmount || parseFloat(betAmount) <= 0) {
      alert('Please enter a valid bet amount');
      return;
    }

    if (parseFloat(betAmount) > balance) {
      alert('Insufficient balance');
      return;
    }

    const amount = parseFloat(betAmount);
    const newBalance = balance - amount;
    await updateBalance(newBalance);

    // Start rolling animation
    setRolling(true);

    // Simulate rolling animation with multiple random numbers
    const rollSequence = [];
    for (let i = 0; i < 15; i++) {
      rollSequence.push(Math.floor(Math.random() * 100) + 1);
    }

    // Animate the rolling
    for (let i = 0; i < rollSequence.length; i++) {
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, i === rollSequence.length - 1 ? 200 : 50));
      setRoll(rollSequence[i]);
    }

    // Final roll
    const randomRoll = Math.floor(Math.random() * 100) + 1;
    setRoll(randomRoll);
    setRolling(false);

    // Determine win/loss
    const isWin = target >= 50 ? randomRoll >= target : randomRoll <= target;
    const multiplier = isWin ? (99 / (target >= 50 ? 100 - target : target)) : 0;
    const winAmount = isWin ? amount * multiplier : 0;

    // Update balance if win
    if (isWin) {
      const finalBalance = newBalance + winAmount;
      await updateBalance(finalBalance);
    }

    // Add to game history
    setGameHistory(prev => [{
      roll: randomRoll,
      target,
      bet: amount,
      win: winAmount,
      isWin,
      timestamp: new Date()
    }, ...prev].slice(0, 20));
  };

  const toggleAutoBet = () => {
    if (autoBet) {
      setAutoBet(false);
      setAutoBetCount(0);
      setAutoBetRuns(0);
    } else {
      if (!autoBetAmount || parseFloat(autoBetAmount) <= 0) {
        alert('Please set a valid auto bet amount');
        return;
      }
      setAutoBet(true);
      setAutoBetCount(0);
      setAutoBetRuns(0);
    }
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    let interval;
    if (autoBet && autoBetCount < autoBetMaxRuns) {
      interval = setInterval(() => {
        const amount = parseFloat(autoBetAmount);
        if (amount > balance) {
          setAutoBet(false);
          return;
        }

        const newBalance = balance - amount;
        updateBalance(newBalance);

        // Start rolling animation
        setRolling(true);

        // Simulate rolling animation
        const rollSequence = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
          rollSequence.push(Math.floor(Math.random() * 100) + 1);
        }

        // Animate the rolling
        let currentStep = 0;
        const rollInterval = setInterval(() => {
          if (currentStep < rollSequence.length) {
            setRoll(rollSequence[currentStep]);
            currentStep++;
          } else {
            clearInterval(rollInterval);
            const randomRoll = Math.floor(Math.random() * 100) + 1;
            setRoll(randomRoll);
            setRolling(false);

            const isWin = autoBetTarget >= 50 ? randomRoll >= autoBetTarget : randomRoll <= autoBetTarget;
            const multiplier = isWin ? (99 / (autoBetTarget >= 50 ? 100 - autoBetTarget : autoBetTarget)) : 0;
            const winAmount = isWin ? amount * multiplier : 0;

            if (isWin) {
              const finalBalance = newBalance + winAmount;
              updateBalance(finalBalance);
            }

            setGameHistory(prev => [{
              roll: randomRoll,
              target: autoBetTarget,
              bet: amount,
              win: winAmount,
              isWin,
              timestamp: new Date()
            }, ...prev].slice(0, 20));

            setAutoBetCount(prev => prev + 1);
            setAutoBetRuns(prev => prev + 1);
          }
        }, 50);
      }, 3000);
    }
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, [autoBet, autoBetCount, autoBetMaxRuns, balance, autoBetAmount, autoBetTarget]);

  // Get dice face based on roll value
  const getDiceFace = (value) => {
    return (
      <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-white rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center text-black text-2xl font-bold shadow-lg">
        {value}
      </div>
    );
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-900 text-white p-4">
      <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-6">
          <button
            onClick={() => router.back()}
            className="text-gray-400 hover:text-white transition-colors"
          >
            ← Back to Games
          </button>
          <div className="bg-purple-600 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg">
            Balance: {balance.toFixed(2)} ✧
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="bg-gray-800 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-6 text-center">Dice Game</h1>

          {/* Main Game Area - Left Side */}
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
            {/* Dice Roll Display and Controls - Left Column */}
            <div className="lg:col-span-2">
              {/* Dice Roll Display at the Top */}
              <div className="bg-gray-700 rounded-lg p-6 mb-6">
                <div className="flex flex-col items-center">
                  <div className="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">
                    {target >= 50 ? 'Rolling OVER' : 'Rolling UNDER'} {target}
                    <span className="ml-2 text-purple-400">
                      Payout: {(99 / (target >= 50 ? 100 - target : target)).toFixed(2)}x
                    </span>
                  </div>

                  <div className="flex items-center space-x-8 mb-4">
                    <div className="text-center">
                      <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Your Target</div>
                      <div className="text-2xl font-bold">{target}</div>
                    </div>

                    <div className="text-center">
                      <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 mb-1">Roll Result</div>
                      <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
                        {rolling ? (
                          <div className="text-2xl">🎲</div>
                        ) : roll === null ? (
                          <div className="text-gray-500">-</div>
                        ) : (
                          getDiceFace(roll)
                        )}
                        {roll && !rolling && (
                          <div className={`text-2xl font-bold ${roll >= target ? 'text-green-400' : 'text-red-400'}`}>
                            {roll >= target ? '↑' : '↓'}
                          </div>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  {/* Target Slider */}
                  <div className="w-full max-w-md">
                    <input
                      type="range"
                      min="1"
                      max="99"
                      value={target}
                      onChange={(e) => {
                        let val = parseInt(e.target.value);
                        if (isNaN(val)) val = 50;
                        if (val < 1) val = 1;
                        if (val > 99) val = 99;
                        setTarget(val);
                      }}
                      className="w-full h-2 bg-gray-600 rounded-lg appearance-none cursor-pointer"
                    />
                    <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-gray-400 mt-1">
                      <span>1</span>
                      <span>50</span>
                      <span>99</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Bet Controls */}
              <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 mb-6">
                <div className="bg-gray-700 rounded-lg p-4">
                  <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Manual Bet</h2>
                  <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div>
                      <label className="block text-sm mb-1">Bet Amount</label>
                      <input
                        type="number"
                        value={betAmount}
                        onChange={(e) => setBetAmount(e.target.value)}
                        className="w-full bg-gray-600 rounded px-3 py-2 text-white"
                        min="0"
                        step="0.01"
                      />
                    </div>
                    <button
                      onClick={rollDice}
                      disabled={!betAmount || parseFloat(betAmount) <= 0 || parseFloat(betAmount) > balance || rolling}
                      className="w-full bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700 py-2 rounded-lg font-semibold transition disabled:opacity-50"
                    >
                      {rolling ? 'Rolling...' : 'Roll Dice'}
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div className="bg-gray-700 rounded-lg p-4">
                  <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Auto Bet</h2>
                  <div className="space-y-4">
                    <div>
                      <label className="block text-sm mb-1">Auto Bet Amount</label>
                      <input
                        type="number"
                        value={autoBetAmount}
                        onChange={(e) => setAutoBetAmount(e.target.value)}
                        className="w-full bg-gray-600 rounded px-3 py-2 text-white"
                        min="0"
                        step="0.01"
                      />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <label className="block text-sm mb-1">Auto Bet Target</label>
                      <input
                        type="number"
                        value={autoBetTarget}
                        onChange={(e) => {
                          let val = parseInt(e.target.value);
                          if (isNaN(val)) val = 50;
                          if (val < 1) val = 1;
                          if (val > 100) val = 100;
                          setAutoBetTarget(val);
                        }}
                        className="w-full bg-gray-600 rounded px-3 py-2 text-white"
                        min="1"
                        max="100"
                      />
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <label className="block text-sm mb-1">Max Runs</label>
                      <input
                        type="number"
                        value={autoBetMaxRuns}
                        onChange={(e) => setAutoBetMaxRuns(parseInt(e.target.value) || 0)}
                        className="w-full bg-gray-600 rounded px-3 py-2 text-white"
                        min="0"
                      />
                    </div>
                    <button
                      onClick={toggleAutoBet}
                      disabled={rolling}
                      className={`w-full ${autoBet ? 'bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700' : 'bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700'} py-2 rounded-lg font-semibold transition disabled:opacity-50`}
                    >
                      {autoBet ? 'Stop Auto Bet' : 'Start Auto Bet'}
                    </button>
                    {autoBet && (
                      <div className="text-sm text-gray-300">
                        Runs: {autoBetRuns}/{autoBetMaxRuns}
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Bet History - Right Column */}
            <div className="lg:col-span-1">
              <div className="bg-gray-700 rounded-lg p-4 h-full">
                <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-4">Bet History</h2>
                <div className="space-y-2 max-h-[600px] overflow-y-auto">
                  {gameHistory.length === 0 ? (
                    <p className="text-gray-400 text-center py-8">No bets yet</p>
                  ) : (
                    gameHistory.map((game, index) => (
                      <div key={index} className="flex justify-between items-center bg-gray-600 rounded p-3">
                        <div className="flex items-center space-x-3">
                          <div className={`w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center ${game.isWin ? 'bg-green-600' : 'bg-red-600'}`}>
                            {game.roll}
                          </div>
                          <div>
                            <div className="text-sm font-medium">
                              {game.isWin ? 'Win' : 'Loss'}
                            </div>
                            <div className="text-xs text-gray-400">
                              {game.target >= 50 ? 'Over' : 'Under'} {game.target}
                            </div>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                        <div className={`font-semibold ${game.isWin ? 'text-green-400' : 'text-red-400'}`}>
                          {game.isWin ? `+${game.win.toFixed(2)}` : `-${game.bet.toFixed(2)}`} ✧
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    ))
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```

Key changes made:

1. **Restructured the layout** to use a 2/3 - 1/3 grid system (left for game controls, right for bet history)
2. **Improved the bet history display** with:
   - Larger, more visible bet history panel on the right
   - Better spacing and visual hierarchy
   - Clear win/loss indicators with colored circles
   - More compact display of each bet
   - Increased history limit from 10 to 20 bets
3. **Added proper scrolling** for the bet history when it gets long
4. **Improved the visual design** of each history item with:
   - Colored circles showing the roll number
   - Clear win/loss labels
   - Target information
   - Amount won/lost
5. **Added empty state** for when there's no bet history yet

The bet history is now much more visible and easier to scan, making it simpler for players to track their recent bets and outcomes.
